SELECT
    "REQUISITION0"."contestnumber" AS "CONTESTNUMBER"
FROM
    "taleo"."requisition" "REQUISITION0" 
GROUP BY 
    "REQUISITION0"."contestnumber" 
ORDER BY 
    "CONTESTNUMBER" ASC NULLS LAST

WITH 
"EMEVENTTYPEDESCRIPTION2" AS 
    (
    SELECT
        "emeventtypedescription"."emeventtypeno" AS "EMEVENTTYPENO", 
        "emeventtypedescription"."emeventtypedesc" AS "EMEVENTTYPEDESC"
    FROM
        "taleo"."emeventtypedescription" 
    WHERE 
        "emeventtypedescription"."locale" = varchar 'en'
    ), 
"HEHISTORYEVENTMESSAGEDESC4" AS 
    (
    SELECT
        "hehistoryeventmessagedesc"."emeventtypeno" AS "EMEVENTTYPENO", 
        "hehistoryeventmessagedesc"."locale" AS "LOCALE", 
        "hehistoryeventmessagedesc"."hehistoryeventmessagedesc" AS "HEHISTORYEVENTMESSAGEDESC", 
        "hehistoryeventmessagedesc"."rowcreationdate" AS "ROWCREATIONDATE", 
        "hehistoryeventmessagedesc"."rowlastmodifieddate" AS "ROWLASTMODIFIEDDATE"
    FROM
        "taleo"."hehistoryeventmessagedesc"
    )
SELECT
    "ps_hehistoryevent_jdo"."creationdate" AS "CREATIONDATE", 
    "EMEVENTTYPEDESCRIPTION2"."EMEVENTTYPEDESC" AS "EMEVENTTYPEDESC", 
    replace(replace(replace(replace("HEHISTORYEVENTMESSAGEDESC4"."HEHISTORYEVENTMESSAGEDESC", varchar '{0}', nvl("ps_hehistoryeventparameter_jdo"."stringvalue1", varchar ' ')), varchar '{1}', nvl("ps_hehistoryeventparameter_jdo"."stringvalue2", varchar ' ')), varchar '{2}', nvl("ps_hehistoryeventparameter_jdo"."stringvalue3", varchar ' ')), varchar '{3}', nvl("ps_hehistoryeventparameter_jdo"."stringvalue4", varchar ' ')) AS "HEHISTORYEVENTMESSAGEDESC", 
    "ps_hehistoryevent_jdo"."originatorcomment" AS "ORIGINATORCOMMENT", 
    "ps_hehistoryevent_jdo"."originatorname" AS "ORIGINATORNAME"
FROM
    "taleo"."requisition" "REQUISITION0"
        LEFT OUTER JOIN 
        "taleo"."ps_hehistoryevent_jdo" "ps_hehistoryevent_jdo"
            INNER JOIN "EMEVENTTYPEDESCRIPTION2"
            ON "ps_hehistoryevent_jdo"."emeventtypeno" = "EMEVENTTYPEDESCRIPTION2"."EMEVENTTYPENO"
                INNER JOIN "HEHISTORYEVENTMESSAGEDESC4"
                ON "ps_hehistoryevent_jdo"."emeventtypeno" = "HEHISTORYEVENTMESSAGEDESC4"."EMEVENTTYPENO"
                    INNER JOIN "taleo"."ps_hehistoryeventparameter_jdo" "ps_hehistoryeventparameter_jdo"
                    ON "ps_hehistoryevent_jdo"."hehistoryeventno" = "ps_hehistoryeventparameter_jdo"."hehistoryeventno"
        ON "REQUISITION0"."requisitionno" = "ps_hehistoryevent_jdo"."hehistsubj_entityno" 
WHERE 
    "HEHISTORYEVENTMESSAGEDESC4"."LOCALE" = varchar 'en' AND
    "REQUISITION0"."contestnumber" = ?
GROUP BY 
    "ps_hehistoryevent_jdo"."creationdate", 
    "EMEVENTTYPEDESCRIPTION2"."EMEVENTTYPEDESC", 
    replace(replace(replace(replace("HEHISTORYEVENTMESSAGEDESC4"."HEHISTORYEVENTMESSAGEDESC", varchar '{0}', nvl("ps_hehistoryeventparameter_jdo"."stringvalue1", varchar ' ')), varchar '{1}', nvl("ps_hehistoryeventparameter_jdo"."stringvalue2", varchar ' ')), varchar '{2}', nvl("ps_hehistoryeventparameter_jdo"."stringvalue3", varchar ' ')), varchar '{3}', nvl("ps_hehistoryeventparameter_jdo"."stringvalue4", varchar ' ')), 
    "ps_hehistoryevent_jdo"."originatorcomment", 
    "ps_hehistoryevent_jdo"."originatorname" 
ORDER BY 
    "CREATIONDATE" DESC NULLS LAST

    WHERE

    FROM

    WHERE

    ), 
"TQ0_Questions_Query" AS 
    (
    SELECT
        "QUESTIONDESCRIPTION__POSSIBLEANSWER_9"."QUESTIONDESC" AS "QUESTIONDESC", 
        "POSSIBLEANSWERDESCRIPTION21"."POSSIBLEANSWER" AS "POSSIBLEANSWER", 
        CASE 
            WHEN 
                CASE "PRESCREENINGFORMPOSSIBLEANSWER5"."isrequired"
                    WHEN 0 THEN varchar 'No'
                    WHEN 1 THEN varchar 'Yes'
                END = varchar 'No'
                THEN
                    varchar '--'
            WHEN 
                CASE "PRESCREENINGFORMPOSSIBLEANSWER5"."isrequired"
                    WHEN 0 THEN varchar 'No'
                    WHEN 1 THEN varchar 'Yes'
                END = varchar 'Yes'
                THEN
                    varchar 'Required'
        END AS "ISREQUIRED", 
        CASE 
            WHEN 
                CASE "PRESCREENINGFORMPOSSIBLEANSWER5"."isasset"
                    WHEN 0 THEN varchar 'No'
                    WHEN 1 THEN varchar 'Yes'
                END = varchar 'No'
                THEN
                    varchar '--'
            WHEN 
                CASE "PRESCREENINGFORMPOSSIBLEANSWER5"."isasset"
                    WHEN 0 THEN varchar 'No'
                    WHEN 1 THEN varchar 'Yes'
                END = varchar 'Yes'
                THEN
                    varchar 'Asset'
        END AS "Asset", 
        COUNT("QUESTIONDESCRIPTION__POSSIBLEANSWER_9"."QUESTIONDESC")
            OVER(
                PARTITION BY
                    "QUESTIONDESCRIPTION__POSSIBLEANSWER_9"."QUESTIONDESC", 
                    "POSSIBLEANSWERDESCRIPTION21"."POSSIBLEANSWER", 
                    CASE 
                        WHEN 
                            CASE "PRESCREENINGFORMPOSSIBLEANSWER5"."isrequired"
                                WHEN 0 THEN varchar 'No'
                                WHEN 1 THEN varchar 'Yes'
                            END = varchar 'No'
                            THEN
                                varchar '--'
                        WHEN 
                            CASE "PRESCREENINGFORMPOSSIBLEANSWER5"."isrequired"

        "olflocation"."workerlocationaddress" AS "WORKERLOCATIONADDRESS",

"LOCATIONQUESTION5" AS 
    (
    SELECT
        "locationquestion"."locationno" AS "LOCATIONNO", 
        "locationquestion"."questionno" AS "QUESTIONNO", 
        "locationquestion"."isinprofiler" AS "ISINPROFILER", 
        "locationquestion"."profilerdisplayseq" AS "PROFILERDISPLAYSEQ", 
        "locationquestion"."isinmodel" AS "ISINMODEL", 
        "locationquestion"."modeldisplayseq" AS "MODELDISPLAYSEQ", 
        "locationquestion"."locationquestionno" AS "LOCATIONQUESTIONNO"
    FROM
        "taleo"."locationquestion"
    ), 
"QUESTION_Disqualifier_6" AS 
    (
    SELECT
        "question"."questionno" AS "QUESTIONNO", 
        "question"."formatofquestionno" AS "FORMATOFQUESTIONNO", 
        "question"."questionscopeno" AS "QUESTIONSCOPENO", 
        "question"."visibilityforcandidateno" AS "VISIBILITYFORCANDIDATENO", 
        "question"."code" AS "CODE"
    FROM
        "taleo"."question" "question" 
    WHERE 
        "question"."typeofquestionno" = 3
    ), 
"FORMATOFQUESTIONDESCRIPTION_Disqualifier_9" AS 
    (
    SELECT
        "formatofquestiondescription"."formatofquestionno" AS "FORMATOFQUESTIONNO", 
        "formatofquestiondescription"."formatofquestiondesc" AS "FORMATOFQUESTIONDESC"
    FROM
        "taleo"."formatofquestiondescription" 
    WHERE 
        "formatofquestiondescription"."locale" = varchar 'en'
    ), 
"QUESTIONDESCRIPTION_Disqualifier_11" AS 
    (
    SELECT
        "questiondescription"."questionno" AS "QUESTIONNO", 
        "questiondescription"."questiondesc" AS "QUESTIONDESC", 
        "questiondescription"."explanationintro" AS "EXPLANATIONINTRO"
    FROM
        "taleo"."questiondescription" "questiondescription" 
    WHERE 
        "questiondescription"."locale" = varchar 'en'
    ), 
"VISIBILITYFORCANDIDATEDESC_Disqualifier_14" AS 
    (
    SELECT
        "visibilityforcandidatedesc"."visibilityforcandidateno" AS "VISIBILITYFORCANDIDATENO", 
        "visibilityforcandidatedesc"."visibilityforcandidatedesc" AS "VISIBILITYFORCANDIDATEDESC"
    FROM
        "taleo"."visibilityforcandidatedesc" "visibilityforcandidatedesc" 
    WHERE 
        "visibilityforcandidatedesc"."locale" = varchar 'en'
    ), 
"QUESTIONSCOPEDESCRIPTION_Disqualifier_" AS 
    (
    SELECT
        "questionscopedescription"."questionscopeno" AS "QUESTIONSCOPENO", 
        "questionscopedescription"."language" AS "LANGUAGE", 
        "questionscopedescription"."questionscopedesc" AS "QUESTIONSCOPEDESC", 
        "questionscopedescription"."locale" AS "LOCALE"
    FROM
        "taleo"."questionscopedescription" "questionscopedescription" 
    WHERE 
        "questionscopedescription"."language" = 2
    ), 
"ANSWER_Disqualifier_" AS 
    (
    SELECT
        "answer"."answerno" AS "ANSWERNO", 
        "answer"."candidateno" AS "CANDIDATENO", 
        "answer"."questionno" AS "QUESTIONNO", 
        "answer"."possibleanswerno" AS "POSSIBLEANSWERNO", 
        "answer"."explanation" AS "EXPLANATION", 
        "answer"."infofeederno" AS "INFOFEEDERNO", 
        "answer"."disqualifierresultno" AS "DISQUALIFIERRESULTNO", 
        "answer"."creationdate" AS "CREATIONDATE"
    FROM
        "taleo"."answer"
    ), 
"DISQUALIFIERRESULTDESCRIPTION_Disqualifier_20" AS 
    (
    SELECT
        "disqualifierresultdescription"."disqualifierresultno" AS "DISQUALIFIERRESULTNO", 
        "disqualifierresultdescription"."disqualifierresultdesc" AS "DISQUALIFIERRESULTDESC"
    FROM
        "taleo"."disqualifierresultdescription" 
    WHERE 
        "disqualifierresultdescription"."locale" = varchar 'en'
    ), 
"POSSIBLEANSWERDESCRIPTION_Disqualifier_22" AS 
    (
    SELECT
        "possibleanswerdescription"."possibleanswerno" AS "POSSIBLEANSWERNO", 
        "possibleanswerdescription"."possibleanswer" AS "POSSIBLEANSWER"
    FROM
        "taleo"."possibleanswerdescription" "possibleanswerdescription" 
    WHERE 
        "possibleanswerdescription"."locale" = varchar 'en'
    ), 
"TQ0_Questionnaire_Query" AS 
    (
    SELECT
        "QUESTIONDESCRIPTION_Disqualifier_11"."QUESTIONDESC" AS "QUESTIONDESC", 
        "POSSIBLEANSWERDESCRIPTION_Disqualifier_22"."POSSIBLEANSWER" AS "POSSIBLEANSWER", 
        "DISQUALIFIERRESULTDESCRIPTION_Disqualifier_20"."DISQUALIFIERRESULTDESC" AS "DISQUALIFIERRESULTDESC", 
        COUNT("QUESTIONDESCRIPTION_Disqualifier_11"."QUESTIONDESC")
            OVER(
                PARTITION BY
                    "QUESTIONDESCRIPTION_Disqualifier_11"."QUESTIONDESC", 
                    "POSSIBLEANSWERDESCRIPTION_Disqualifier_22"."POSSIBLEANSWER", 
                    "DISQUALIFIERRESULTDESCRIPTION_Disqualifier_20"."DISQUALIFIERRESULTDESC"
                ORDER BY
                    "QUESTIONDESCRIPTION_Disqualifier_11"."QUESTIONDESC" ASC, 
                    "POSSIBLEANSWERDESCRIPTION_Disqualifier_22"."POSSIBLEANSWER" ASC, 
                    "DISQUALIFIERRESULTDESCRIPTION_Disqualifier_20"."DISQUALIFIERRESULTDESC" ASC
             ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
            ) AS "Row_Number0", 
        "QUESTIONSCOPEDESCRIPTION_Disqualifier_"."QUESTIONSCOPEDESC" AS "QUESTIONSCOPEDESC", 
        "QUESTION_Disqualifier_6"."CODE" AS "CODE", 
        "FORMATOFQUESTIONDESCRIPTION_Disqualifier_9"."FORMATOFQUESTIONDESC" AS "FORMATOFQUESTIONDESC", 
        "VISIBILITYFORCANDIDATEDESC_Disqualifier_14"."VISIBILITYFORCANDIDATEDESC" AS "VISIBILITYFORCANDIDATEDESC", 
        "QUESTIONDESCRIPTION_Disqualifier_11"."EXPLANATIONINTRO" AS "EXPLANATIONINTRO"
    FROM
        "taleo"."requisition" "REQUISITION0"
            LEFT OUTER JOIN "taleo"."requisitionlocation" "REQUISITIONLOCATION__Disqualifier_"
            ON "REQUISITIONLOCATION__Disqualifier_"."requisitionno" = "REQUISITION0"."requisitionno"
                LEFT OUTER JOIN 
                "OLFLOCATION__Disqualifier_"
                    INNER JOIN "taleo"."olflocationdescopti" "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__Disqualifier_"
                    ON "OLFLOCATION__Disqualifier_"."OLFLOCATIONNO" = "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__Disqualifier_"."olflocationno"
                ON "REQUISITIONLOCATION__Disqualifier_"."olflocationno" = "OLFLOCATION__Disqualifier_"."OLFLOCATIONNO"
                    LEFT OUTER JOIN "LOCATIONQUESTION5"
                    ON "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__Disqualifier_"."olflocationno2" = "LOCATIONQUESTION5"."LOCATIONNO"
                        LEFT OUTER JOIN 
                        "QUESTION_Disqualifier_6"
                            INNER JOIN "FORMATOFQUESTIONDESCRIPTION_Disqualifier_9"
                            ON "QUESTION_Disqualifier_6"."FORMATOFQUESTIONNO" = "FORMATOFQUESTIONDESCRIPTION_Disqualifier_9"."FORMATOFQUESTIONNO"
                                INNER JOIN "QUESTIONDESCRIPTION_Disqualifier_11"
                                ON "QUESTION_Disqualifier_6"."QUESTIONNO" = "QUESTIONDESCRIPTION_Disqualifier_11"."QUESTIONNO"
                                    INNER JOIN "VISIBILITYFORCANDIDATEDESC_Disqualifier_14"
                                    ON "QUESTION_Disqualifier_6"."VISIBILITYFORCANDIDATENO" = "VISIBILITYFORCANDIDATEDESC_Disqualifier_14"."VISIBILITYFORCANDIDATENO"
                                        INNER JOIN "QUESTIONSCOPEDESCRIPTION_Disqualifier_"
                                        ON "QUESTIONSCOPEDESCRIPTION_Disqualifier_"."QUESTIONSCOPENO" = "QUESTION_Disqualifier_6"."QUESTIONSCOPENO"
                        ON "LOCATIONQUESTION5"."QUESTIONNO" = "QUESTION_Disqualifier_6"."QUESTIONNO"
                            LEFT OUTER JOIN 
                            "ANSWER_Disqualifier_"
                                INNER JOIN "DISQUALIFIERRESULTDESCRIPTION_Disqualifier_20"
                                ON "ANSWER_Disqualifier_"."DISQUALIFIERRESULTNO" = "DISQUALIFIERRESULTDESCRIPTION_Disqualifier_20"."DISQUALIFIERRESULTNO"
                            ON "ANSWER_Disqualifier_"."QUESTIONNO" = "QUESTION_Disqualifier_6"."QUESTIONNO"
                                LEFT OUTER JOIN "POSSIBLEANSWERDESCRIPTION_Disqualifier_22"
                                ON "POSSIBLEANSWERDESCRIPTION_Disqualifier_22"."POSSIBLEANSWERNO" = "ANSWER_Disqualifier_"."POSSIBLEANSWERNO" 
    WHERE 
        "REQUISITION0"."contestnumber" = ? AND
        NOT ( "QUESTIONDESCRIPTION_Disqualifier_11"."QUESTIONDESC" IS NULL )
    ), 
"SQ0_Questionnaire_Query" AS 
    (
    SELECT
        "D1"."C0" AS "QUESTIONDESC", 
        "D1"."C1" AS "Row_Number0", 
        "D1"."C2" AS "POSSIBLEANSWER", 
        "D1"."C3" AS "DISQUALIFIERRESULTDESC", 
        MIN("D1"."C4") AS "Min1", 
        MIN("D1"."C5") AS "Min11", 
        MIN("D1"."C6") AS "Min12", 
        MIN("D1"."C7") AS "Min13", 
        MIN("D1"."C8") AS "Min14"
    FROM
        (
        SELECT
            "TQ0_Questionnaire_Query"."QUESTIONDESC" AS "C0", 
            MIN("TQ0_Questionnaire_Query"."Row_Number0")
                OVER(
                    PARTITION BY
                        "TQ0_Questionnaire_Query"."QUESTIONDESC", 
                        "TQ0_Questionnaire_Query"."POSSIBLEANSWER", 
                        "TQ0_Questionnaire_Query"."DISQUALIFIERRESULTDESC"
                ) AS "C1", 
            "TQ0_Questionnaire_Query"."POSSIBLEANSWER" AS "C2", 
            "TQ0_Questionnaire_Query"."DISQUALIFIERRESULTDESC" AS "C3", 
            "TQ0_Questionnaire_Query"."QUESTIONSCOPEDESC" AS "C4", 
            "TQ0_Questionnaire_Query"."CODE" AS "C5", 
            "TQ0_Questionnaire_Query"."FORMATOFQUESTIONDESC" AS "C6", 
            "TQ0_Questionnaire_Query"."VISIBILITYFORCANDIDATEDESC" AS "C7", 
            "TQ0_Questionnaire_Query"."EXPLANATIONINTRO" AS "C8"
        FROM
            "TQ0_Questionnaire_Query"
        ) "D1" 
    GROUP BY 
        "D1"."C0", 
        "D1"."C1", 
        "D1"."C2", 
        "D1"."C3"
    )
SELECT
    "SQ0_Questionnaire_Query"."QUESTIONDESC" AS "QUESTIONDESC", 
    "SQ0_Questionnaire_Query"."Row_Number0" AS "Row_Number0", 
    MIN("SQ0_Questionnaire_Query"."Min1")
        OVER(
            PARTITION BY
                "SQ0_Questionnaire_Query"."QUESTIONDESC"
        ) AS "QUESTIONSCOPEDESC", 
    MIN("SQ0_Questionnaire_Query"."Min11")
        OVER(
            PARTITION BY
                "SQ0_Questionnaire_Query"."QUESTIONDESC"
        ) AS "Code", 
    MIN("SQ0_Questionnaire_Query"."Min12")
        OVER(
            PARTITION BY
                "SQ0_Questionnaire_Query"."QUESTIONDESC"
        ) AS "FORMATOFQUESTIONDESC", 
    MIN("SQ0_Questionnaire_Query"."Min13")
        OVER(
            PARTITION BY
                "SQ0_Questionnaire_Query"."QUESTIONDESC"
        ) AS "VISIBILITYFORCANDIDATEDESC", 
    MIN("SQ0_Questionnaire_Query"."Min14")
        OVER(
            PARTITION BY
                "SQ0_Questionnaire_Query"."QUESTIONDESC"
        ) AS "EXPLANATIONINTRO", 
    "SQ0_Questionnaire_Query"."POSSIBLEANSWER" AS "POSSIBLEANSWER", 
    "SQ0_Questionnaire_Query"."DISQUALIFIERRESULTDESC" AS "DISQUALIFIERRESULTDESC"
FROM
    "SQ0_Questionnaire_Query" 
ORDER BY 
    "QUESTIONDESC" ASC NULLS LAST, 
    "POSSIBLEANSWER" ASC NULLS LAST, 
    "DISQUALIFIERRESULTDESC" ASC NULLS LAST

        WHEN "ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."LASTNAME" IS NULL THEN NULL
        ELSE TRIM(BOTH FROM ((((NVL("ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."LASTNAME", varchar ' ') || varchar ', ') || NVL("ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."FIRSTNAME", varchar ' ')) || varchar ' ') || NVL("ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."MIDDLEINITIAL", varchar ' ')))
    END AS "HIRING_MGR_ASSISTANT_NAME",

        ELSE varchar 'Yes'
    END AS "Auto_Reject_Filled",

        ELSE varchar 'Yes'
    END AS "Auto_Reject_Cancelled",

        ELSE varchar 'Yes'
    END AS "Auto_Decline_Candidates",

    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cgps_rolesummary" AS "CGPS_ROLESUMMARY", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_eeo" AS "CG_EEO"
FROM
    "HIRETYPE0"
        INNER JOIN "taleo"."rpresource" "RPRESOURCE_Requisition_Type_"
        ON "HIRETYPE0"."RPRESOURCENO" = "RPRESOURCE_Requisition_Type_"."rpresourceno"
            INNER JOIN "JOBINFORMATION3"
            ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."HIRETYPENO" = "HIRETYPE0"."HIRETYPENO"
                INNER JOIN "taleo"."ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo" "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"
                ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."JOBINFORMATIONNO" = "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."jobinformationno"
                    INNER JOIN "RSJOBLEVELDESCRIPTION_Requisition_4"
                    ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."JOBLEVELNO" = "RSJOBLEVELDESCRIPTION_Requisition_4"."RSJOBLEVELNO"
                        INNER JOIN "taleo"."requisition" "REQUISITION7"
                        ON "REQUISITION7"."jobinformationno" = "JOBINFORMATION3"."JOBINFORMATIONNO"
                            INNER JOIN "RSJOBTYPEDESCRIPTION__Requisition_9"
                            ON "RSJOBTYPEDESCRIPTION__Requisition_9"."RSJOBTYPENO" = "JOBINFORMATION3"."JOBTYPENO"
                                LEFT OUTER JOIN "taleo"."ps_candofr_jdo" "PS_CANDOFR_JDO_Requisition_"
                                ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."OFFERNO" = "PS_CANDOFR_JDO_Requisition_"."offerno"
                                    LEFT OUTER JOIN "taleo"."olforganizationdescopti" "OLFORGANIZATIONDESCOPTI__REQUISITION_"
                                    ON "REQUISITION7"."olforganizationno" = "OLFORGANIZATIONDESCOPTI__REQUISITION_"."olforganizationno"
                                        LEFT OUTER JOIN "JOBINFORMATIONDESCRIPTION12"
                                        ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."JOBINFORMATIONNO" = "JOBINFORMATIONDESCRIPTION12"."JOBINFORMATIONNO"
                                            LEFT OUTER JOIN 
                                            "OLFLOCATION__PRIMARY_"
                                                INNER JOIN "taleo"."olflocationdescopti" "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"

                                            ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."PRIMARYLOCATIONNO" = "OLFLOCATION__PRIMARY_"."OLFLOCATIONNO"
                                                LEFT OUTER JOIN

                                                    INNER JOIN "RPRESOURCEVALUE16"
                                                    ON "WILLTRAVEL14"."rpresourceno" = "RPRESOURCEVALUE16"."RPRESOURCENO"
                                                ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."WILLTRAVELNO" = "WILLTRAVEL14"."willtravelno"
                                                    LEFT OUTER JOIN "ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"
                                                    ON "REQUISITION7"."hiringmanagerassistantno" = "ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."ARUSERNO"
                                                        LEFT OUTER JOIN "HIRE_COUNT_"
                                                        ON "REQUISITION7"."requisitionno" = "HIRE_COUNT_"."REQUISITIONNO"
                                                            LEFT OUTER JOIN "JUSTIFICATIONDESCRIPTION21"
                                                            ON "REQUISITION7"."justificationno" = "JUSTIFICATIONDESCRIPTION21"."JUSTIFICATIONNO"
                                                                LEFT OUTER JOIN "taleo"."ps_department_jdo" "ps_department_jdo"
                                                                ON "REQUISITION7"."departmentno" = "ps_department_jdo"."departmentno" 
WHERE 
    "REQUISITION7"."contestnumber" = ? AND
    "JOBINFORMATIONDESCRIPTION12"."LOCALE" = varchar 'en' 
GROUP BY

    "REQUISITION7"."contestnumber",

    "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name4", 
    "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name5",

    (("PS_CANDOFR_JDO_Requisition_"."cgps_jobcode" || varchar ' - ') || "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cgps_jobtitle"), 
    CASE 
        WHEN "ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."LASTNAME" IS NULL THEN NULL
        ELSE TRIM(BOTH FROM ((((NVL("ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."LASTNAME", varchar ' ') || varchar ', ') || NVL("ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."FIRSTNAME", varchar ' ')) || varchar ' ') || NVL("ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."MIDDLEINITIAL", varchar ' ')))
    END, 
    CASE

        ELSE varchar 'Yes'
    END, 
    CASE 
        WHEN "JOBINFORMATION3"."ISAUTOREJECTCANCELLED" = 0 THEN varchar 'No'
        ELSE varchar 'Yes'
    END, 
    CASE 
        WHEN "JOBINFORMATION3"."AUTODECLINECANDIDATES" = 0 THEN varchar 'No'
        ELSE varchar 'Yes'

    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_homebased_internal",

        ELSE TRIM(BOTH FROM ((((NVL("ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."LASTNAME", varchar ' ') || varchar ', ') || NVL("ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."FIRSTNAME", varchar ' ')) || varchar ' ') || NVL("ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."MIDDLEINITIAL", varchar ' ')))

        ELSE varchar 'Yes'

    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_eeo" AS "CG_EEO"
FROM
    "HIRETYPE0"
        INNER JOIN "taleo"."rpresource" "RPRESOURCE_Requisition_Type_"
        ON "HIRETYPE0"."RPRESOURCENO" = "RPRESOURCE_Requisition_Type_"."rpresourceno"
            INNER JOIN "JOBINFORMATION3"
            ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."HIRETYPENO" = "HIRETYPE0"."HIRETYPENO"
                INNER JOIN "taleo"."ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo" "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"
                ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."JOBINFORMATIONNO" = "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."jobinformationno"
                    INNER JOIN "RSJOBLEVELDESCRIPTION_Requisition_4"
                    ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."JOBLEVELNO" = "RSJOBLEVELDESCRIPTION_Requisition_4"."RSJOBLEVELNO"
                        INNER JOIN "taleo"."requisition" "REQUISITION7"
                        ON "REQUISITION7"."jobinformationno" = "JOBINFORMATION3"."JOBINFORMATIONNO"
                            INNER JOIN "RSJOBTYPEDESCRIPTION__Requisition_9"
                            ON "RSJOBTYPEDESCRIPTION__Requisition_9"."RSJOBTYPENO" = "JOBINFORMATION3"."JOBTYPENO"
                                LEFT OUTER JOIN "taleo"."ps_candofr_jdo" "PS_CANDOFR_JDO_Requisition_"
                                ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."OFFERNO" = "PS_CANDOFR_JDO_Requisition_"."offerno"
                                    LEFT OUTER JOIN "taleo"."olforganizationdescopti" "OLFORGANIZATIONDESCOPTI__REQUISITION_"
                                    ON "REQUISITION7"."olforganizationno" = "OLFORGANIZATIONDESCOPTI__REQUISITION_"."olforganizationno"
                                        LEFT OUTER JOIN "JOBINFORMATIONDESCRIPTION12"
                                        ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."JOBINFORMATIONNO" = "JOBINFORMATIONDESCRIPTION12"."JOBINFORMATIONNO"
                                            LEFT OUTER JOIN 
                                            "OLFLOCATION__PRIMARY_"
                                                INNER JOIN "taleo"."olflocationdescopti" "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"
                                                ON "OLFLOCATION__PRIMARY_"."OLFLOCATIONNO" = "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."olflocationno"
                                            ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."PRIMARYLOCATIONNO" = "OLFLOCATION__PRIMARY_"."OLFLOCATIONNO"

                                                    INNER JOIN "RPRESOURCEVALUE16"
                                                    ON "WILLTRAVEL14"."rpresourceno" = "RPRESOURCEVALUE16"."RPRESOURCENO"
                                                ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."WILLTRAVELNO" = "WILLTRAVEL14"."willtravelno"
                                                    LEFT OUTER JOIN "ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"
                                                    ON "REQUISITION7"."hiringmanagerassistantno" = "ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."ARUSERNO"
                                                        LEFT OUTER JOIN "HIRE_COUNT_"
                                                        ON "REQUISITION7"."requisitionno" = "HIRE_COUNT_"."REQUISITIONNO"
                                                            LEFT OUTER JOIN "JUSTIFICATIONDESCRIPTION21"
                                                            ON "REQUISITION7"."justificationno" = "JUSTIFICATIONDESCRIPTION21"."JUSTIFICATIONNO"
                                                                LEFT OUTER JOIN "taleo"."ps_department_jdo" "ps_department_jdo"
                                                                ON "REQUISITION7"."departmentno" = "ps_department_jdo"."departmentno" 
WHERE 
    "REQUISITION7"."contestnumber" = ? AND
    "JOBINFORMATIONDESCRIPTION12"."LOCALE" = varchar 'en'

        ELSE TRIM(BOTH FROM ((((NVL("ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."LASTNAME", varchar ' ') || varchar ', ') || NVL("ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."FIRSTNAME", varchar ' ')) || varchar ' ') || NVL("ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."MIDDLEINITIAL", varchar ' ')))
    END,

        ELSE varchar 'Yes'
    END,

    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cgps_rolesummary" AS "CGPS_ROLESUMMARY", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_eeo" AS "CG_EEO"
FROM
    "HIRETYPE0"
        INNER JOIN "taleo"."rpresource" "RPRESOURCE_Requisition_Type_"
        ON "HIRETYPE0"."RPRESOURCENO" = "RPRESOURCE_Requisition_Type_"."rpresourceno"
            INNER JOIN "JOBINFORMATION3"
            ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."HIRETYPENO" = "HIRETYPE0"."HIRETYPENO"
                INNER JOIN "taleo"."ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo" "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"
                ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."JOBINFORMATIONNO" = "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."jobinformationno"
                    INNER JOIN "RSJOBLEVELDESCRIPTION_Requisition_4"
                    ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."JOBLEVELNO" = "RSJOBLEVELDESCRIPTION_Requisition_4"."RSJOBLEVELNO"
                        INNER JOIN "taleo"."requisition" "REQUISITION7"
                        ON "REQUISITION7"."jobinformationno" = "JOBINFORMATION3"."JOBINFORMATIONNO"
                            INNER JOIN "RSJOBTYPEDESCRIPTION__Requisition_9"
                            ON "RSJOBTYPEDESCRIPTION__Requisition_9"."RSJOBTYPENO" = "JOBINFORMATION3"."JOBTYPENO"
                                LEFT OUTER JOIN "taleo"."ps_candofr_jdo" "PS_CANDOFR_JDO_Requisition_"
                                ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."OFFERNO" = "PS_CANDOFR_JDO_Requisition_"."offerno"
                                    LEFT OUTER JOIN "taleo"."olforganizationdescopti" "OLFORGANIZATIONDESCOPTI__REQUISITION_"
                                    ON "REQUISITION7"."olforganizationno" = "OLFORGANIZATIONDESCOPTI__REQUISITION_"."olforganizationno"
                                        LEFT OUTER JOIN "JOBINFORMATIONDESCRIPTION12"
                                        ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."JOBINFORMATIONNO" = "JOBINFORMATIONDESCRIPTION12"."JOBINFORMATIONNO"
                                            LEFT OUTER JOIN 
                                            "OLFLOCATION__PRIMARY_"
                                                INNER JOIN "taleo"."olflocationdescopti" "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"
                                                ON "OLFLOCATION__PRIMARY_"."OLFLOCATIONNO" = "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."olflocationno"
                                            ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."PRIMARYLOCATIONNO" = "OLFLOCATION__PRIMARY_"."OLFLOCATIONNO"
                                                LEFT OUTER JOIN 
                                                "taleo"."willtravel" "WILLTRAVEL14"
                                                    INNER JOIN "RPRESOURCEVALUE16"
                                                    ON "WILLTRAVEL14"."rpresourceno" = "RPRESOURCEVALUE16"."RPRESOURCENO"
                                                ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."WILLTRAVELNO" = "WILLTRAVEL14"."willtravelno"
                                                    LEFT OUTER JOIN "ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"
                                                    ON "REQUISITION7"."hiringmanagerassistantno" = "ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."ARUSERNO"
                                                        LEFT OUTER JOIN "HIRE_COUNT_"
                                                        ON "REQUISITION7"."requisitionno" = "HIRE_COUNT_"."REQUISITIONNO"
                                                            LEFT OUTER JOIN "JUSTIFICATIONDESCRIPTION21"
                                                            ON "REQUISITION7"."justificationno" = "JUSTIFICATIONDESCRIPTION21"."JUSTIFICATIONNO"
                                                                LEFT OUTER JOIN "taleo"."ps_department_jdo" "ps_department_jdo"
                                                                ON "REQUISITION7"."departmentno" = "ps_department_jdo"."departmentno" 
WHERE 
    "REQUISITION7"."contestnumber" = ? AND
    "JOBINFORMATIONDESCRIPTION12"."LOCALE" = varchar 'en' 
GROUP BY 
    "JOBINFORMATIONDESCRIPTION12"."TITLE", 
    "REQUISITION7"."contestnumber", 
    concat(concat(concat(concat(concat(concat("OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name2", varchar ' > '), "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name3"), varchar ' > '), "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name4"), varchar ' > '), "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name5"), 
    "RPRESOURCE_Requisition_Type_"."name", 
    concat(concat(COALESCE(
        "HIRE_COUNT_"."HIRE_COUNT", 
        0), varchar ' out of '), "JOBINFORMATION3"."NBTOHIRE"), 
    "JOBINFORMATION3"."NBTOHIRE", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_psacquisitioncode", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_positionbudgeted", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_candidatepreselected", 
    CASE 
        WHEN "JUSTIFICATIONDESCRIPTION21"."LANGUAGE" = varchar '2' THEN "JUSTIFICATIONDESCRIPTION21"."JUSTIFICATIONDESC"
    END, 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_role_type", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_products", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_leadershipdevprogreq", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_leadershipdevstatus", 
    "OLFORGANIZATIONDESCOPTI__REQUISITION_"."name2", 
    "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name2", 
    "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name3", 
    "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name4", 
    "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name5", 
    (("ps_department_jdo"."departmentnumber" || varchar ' - ') || "ps_department_jdo"."departmentname"), 
    (("PS_CANDOFR_JDO_Requisition_"."cgps_jobcode" || varchar ' - ') || "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cgps_jobtitle"), 
    CASE 
        WHEN "ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."LASTNAME" IS NULL THEN NULL
        ELSE TRIM(BOTH FROM ((((NVL("ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."LASTNAME", varchar ' ') || varchar ', ') || NVL("ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."FIRSTNAME", varchar ' ')) || varchar ' ') || NVL("ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."MIDDLEINITIAL", varchar ' ')))
    END, 
    CASE 
        WHEN "JOBINFORMATION3"."ISAUTOREJECTFILLED" = 0 THEN varchar 'No'
        ELSE varchar 'Yes'
    END, 
    CASE 
        WHEN "JOBINFORMATION3"."ISAUTOREJECTCANCELLED" = 0 THEN varchar 'No'
        ELSE varchar 'Yes'
    END, 
    CASE 
        WHEN "JOBINFORMATION3"."AUTODECLINECANDIDATES" = 0 THEN varchar 'No'
        ELSE varchar 'Yes'
    END, 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_referralplan", 
    "RSJOBTYPEDESCRIPTION__Requisition_9"."RSJOBTYPEDESC", 
    "RSJOBLEVELDESCRIPTION_Requisition_4"."RSJOBLEVELDESC", 
    "RPRESOURCEVALUE16"."VALUE", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_homebased", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_homebased_internal", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cgps_rolesummary", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_eeo"

WITH 
"HIRETYPE0" AS 
    (
    SELECT
        "hiretype"."hiretypeno" AS "HIRETYPENO", 
        "hiretype"."active" AS "ACTIVE", 
        "hiretype"."seq" AS "SEQ",

"JOBINFORMATION3" AS

        "jobinformation"."creationdate" AS "CREATIONDATE", 
        "jobinformation"."isautorejectcancelled" AS "ISAUTOREJECTCANCELLED", 
        "jobinformation"."autodeclinecandidates" AS "AUTODECLINECANDIDATES", 
        "jobinformation"."metaprescreeningformno" AS "METAPRESCREENINGFORMNO", 
        "jobinformation"."contingentcurrencyno" AS "CONTINGENTCURRENCYNO", 
        "jobinformation"."requestedbillrate" AS "REQUESTEDBILLRATE", 
        "jobinformation"."estimatedexpense" AS "ESTIMATEDEXPENSE", 
        "jobinformation"."isexpensereimbursable" AS "ISEXPENSEREIMBURSABLE", 
        "jobinformation"."estimatedlaborcost" AS "ESTIMATEDLABORCOST", 
        "jobinformation"."estimatedtotalbudget" AS "ESTIMATEDTOTALBUDGET", 
        "jobinformation"."searchvalue_int" AS "SEARCHVALUE_INT", 
        "jobinformation"."searchvalue_ext" AS "SEARCHVALUE_EXT", 
        "jobinformation"."jobroleno" AS "JOBROLENO", 
        "jobinformation"."billratemedian" AS "BILLRATEMEDIAN",

        "jobinformation"."unlimitedhire" AS "UNLIMITEDHIRE", 
        "jobinformation"."validityperiodenabled" AS "VALIDITYPERIODENABLED", 
        "jobinformation"."validityperiod" AS "VALIDITYPERIOD", 
        "jobinformation"."cswworkflowno" AS "CSWWORKFLOWNO", 
        "jobinformation"."autopoolingenabled" AS "AUTOPOOLINGENABLED", 
        "jobinformation"."rcautopoolingcriteriano" AS "RCAUTOPOOLINGCRITERIANO", 
        "jobinformation"."isautorejectfilled" AS "ISAUTOREJECTFILLED"
    FROM
        "taleo"."jobinformation"
    ), 
"RSJOBLEVELDESCRIPTION_Requisition_4" AS 
    (
    SELECT
        "rsjobleveldescription"."rsjoblevelno" AS "RSJOBLEVELNO", 
        "rsjobleveldescription"."rsjobleveldesc" AS "RSJOBLEVELDESC"
    FROM
        "taleo"."rsjobleveldescription" "rsjobleveldescription" 
    WHERE 
        "rsjobleveldescription"."language" = 2
    ), 
"RSJOBTYPEDESCRIPTION__Requisition_9" AS 
    (
    SELECT
        "rsjobtypedescription"."rsjobtypeno" AS "RSJOBTYPENO", 
        "rsjobtypedescription"."rsjobtypedesc" AS "RSJOBTYPEDESC"
    FROM
        "taleo"."rsjobtypedescription" "rsjobtypedescription" 
    WHERE 
        "rsjobtypedescription"."language" = 2
    ), 
"JOBINFORMATIONDESCRIPTION12" AS 
    (
    SELECT
        "jobinformationdescription"."jobinformationno" AS "JOBINFORMATIONNO", 
        "jobinformationdescription"."title" AS "TITLE", 
        "jobinformationdescription"."internaldescriptionhtml" AS "INTERNALDESCRIPTIONHTML", 
        "jobinformationdescription"."externaldescriptionhtml" AS "EXTERNALDESCRIPTIONHTML", 
        "jobinformationdescription"."jobboardsummarydesc" AS "JOBBOARDSUMMARYDESC", 
        "jobinformationdescription"."internalqualificationhtml" AS "INTERNALQUALIFICATIONHTML", 
        "jobinformationdescription"."externalqualificationhtml" AS "EXTERNALQUALIFICATIONHTML", 
        "jobinformationdescription"."languagecompletionstatusno" AS "LANGUAGECOMPLETIONSTATUSNO", 
        "jobinformationdescription"."department" AS "DEPARTMENT", 
        "jobinformationdescription"."internaldescription" AS "INTERNALDESCRIPTION", 
        "jobinformationdescription"."externaldescription" AS "EXTERNALDESCRIPTION", 
        "jobinformationdescription"."internalqualification" AS "INTERNALQUALIFICATION", 
        "jobinformationdescription"."externalqualification" AS "EXTERNALQUALIFICATION", 
        "jobinformationdescription"."locale" AS "LOCALE", 
        "jobinformationdescription"."isactive" AS "ISACTIVE", 
        "jobinformationdescription"."isbase" AS "ISBASE", 
        "jobinformationdescription"."titlesv" AS "TITLESV"
    FROM
        "taleo"."jobinformationdescription"
    ), 
"OLFLOCATION__PRIMARY_" AS 
    (
    SELECT
        "olflocation"."olflocationno" AS "OLFLOCATIONNO", 
        "olflocation"."externallocationno" AS "EXTERNALLOCATIONNO", 
        "olflocation"."vpdid" AS "VPDID", 
        "olflocation"."parentolflocationno" AS "PARENTOLFLOCATIONNO", 
        "olflocation"."olfrslocationno" AS "OLFRSLOCATIONNO", 
        "olflocation"."abbreviation" AS "ABBREVIATION", 
        "olflocation"."zipcode" AS "ZIPCODE", 
        "olflocation"."customerid" AS "CUSTOMERID", 
        "olflocation"."code" AS "CODE", 
        "olflocation"."iscomplete" AS "ISCOMPLETE", 
        "olflocation"."rowcreationdate" AS "ROWCREATIONDATE", 
        "olflocation"."rowlastmodifieddate" AS "ROWLASTMODIFIEDDATE", 
        "olflocation"."akxadminentitystatusno" AS "AKXADMINENTITYSTATUSNO", 
        "olflocation"."lastmodifiedon" AS "LASTMODIFIEDON", 
        "olflocation"."latitude" AS "LATITUDE", 
        "olflocation"."longitude" AS "LONGITUDE", 
        "olflocation"."geocodinglastupdate" AS "GEOCODINGLASTUPDATE", 
        "olflocation"."geocodingdataused" AS "GEOCODINGDATAUSED", 
        "olflocation"."workerlocationaddress" AS "WORKERLOCATIONADDRESS", 
        "olflocation"."isworkerlocation" AS "ISWORKERLOCATION"
    FROM
        "taleo"."olflocation"
    ), 
"RPRESOURCEVALUE16" AS 
    (
    SELECT
        "rpresourcevalue"."rpresourceno" AS "RPRESOURCENO", 
        "rpresourcevalue"."value" AS "VALUE"
    FROM
        "taleo"."rpresourcevalue" "rpresourcevalue" 
    WHERE 
        "rpresourcevalue"."locale" = varchar 'en' AND
        "rpresourcevalue"."locale" = varchar 'en'
    ), 
"ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_" AS 
    (
    SELECT
        "aruser"."aruserguid" AS "ARUSERGUID", 
        "aruser"."vpdid" AS "VPDID", 
        "aruser"."firstname" AS "FIRSTNAME", 
        "aruser"."lastname" AS "LASTNAME", 
        "aruser"."correspondenceemail" AS "CORRESPONDENCEEMAIL", 
        "aruser"."employeeid" AS "EMPLOYEEID", 
        "aruser"."issystem" AS "ISSYSTEM", 
        "aruser"."rowcreationdate" AS "ROWCREATIONDATE", 
        "aruser"."rowlastmodifieddate" AS "ROWLASTMODIFIEDDATE", 
        "aruser"."title" AS "TITLE", 
        "aruser"."middleinitial" AS "MIDDLEINITIAL", 
        "aruser"."prefix" AS "PREFIX", 
        "aruser"."suffix" AS "SUFFIX", 
        "aruser"."corporateemail" AS "CORPORATEEMAIL", 
        "aruser"."personalemail" AS "PERSONALEMAIL", 
        "aruser"."homephone" AS "HOMEPHONE", 
        "aruser"."workphone" AS "WORKPHONE", 
        "aruser"."workphoneextension" AS "WORKPHONEEXTENSION", 
        "aruser"."mobilephone" AS "MOBILEPHONE", 
        "aruser"."pager" AS "PAGER", 
        "aruser"."fax" AS "FAX", 
        "aruser"."streetaddress" AS "STREETADDRESS", 
        "aruser"."city" AS "CITY", 
        "aruser"."state" AS "STATE", 
        "aruser"."country" AS "COUNTRY", 
        "aruser"."zipcode" AS "ZIPCODE", 
        "aruser"."languages" AS "LANGUAGES", 
        "aruser"."timezoneid" AS "TIMEZONEID", 
        "aruser"."streetaddress2" AS "STREETADDRESS2", 
        "aruser"."streetaddress3" AS "STREETADDRESS3", 
        "aruser"."departmentnumber" AS "DEPARTMENTNUMBER", 
        "aruser"."correspondencelanguage" AS "CORRESPONDENCELANGUAGE", 
        "aruser"."supnum" AS "SUPNUM", 
        "aruser"."arphonetypeno" AS "ARPHONETYPENO", 
        "aruser"."aruserno" AS "ARUSERNO", 
        "aruser"."arconfigprofileno" AS "ARCONFIGPROFILENO", 
        "aruser"."lastmodifieddate" AS "LASTMODIFIEDDATE", 
        "aruser"."firstnamesv" AS "FIRSTNAMESV", 
        "aruser"."lastnamesv" AS "LASTNAMESV", 
        "aruser"."arinternalusertypeno" AS "ARINTERNALUSERTYPENO"
    FROM
        "taleo"."aruser"
    ), 
"HIRE_COUNT_" AS 
    (
    SELECT
        "rcapplication"."requisitionno" AS "REQUISITIONNO", 
        COUNT(DISTINCT "rcapplication"."rcapplicationno") AS "HIRE_COUNT"
    FROM
        "taleo"."rcapplication" 
    WHERE 
        "rcapplication"."applicationstateno" = 6 AND
        "rcapplication"."entitystatusno" = 0 
    GROUP BY 
        "rcapplication"."requisitionno"
    ), 
"JUSTIFICATIONDESCRIPTION21" AS 
    (
    SELECT
        "justificationdescription"."justificationno" AS "JUSTIFICATIONNO", 
        "justificationdescription"."language" AS "LANGUAGE", 
        "justificationdescription"."justificationdesc" AS "JUSTIFICATIONDESC"
    FROM
        "taleo"."justificationdescription" 
    WHERE 
        "justificationdescription"."language" = 2
    )
SELECT
    "JOBINFORMATIONDESCRIPTION12"."TITLE" AS "TITLE", 
    "REQUISITION7"."contestnumber" AS "REQUISITION_ID", 
    concat(concat(concat(concat(concat(concat("OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name2", varchar ' > '), "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name3"), varchar ' > '), "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name4"), varchar ' > '), "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name5") AS "Primary_Location", 
    "RPRESOURCE_Requisition_Type_"."name" AS "Requisition_Type", 
    concat(concat(COALESCE(
        "HIRE_COUNT_"."HIRE_COUNT", 
        0), varchar ' out of '), "JOBINFORMATION3"."NBTOHIRE") AS "Hired_Candidates", 
    "JOBINFORMATION3"."NBTOHIRE" AS "Number_of_Openings", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_psacquisitioncode" AS "CG_PSACQUISITIONCODE", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_positionbudgeted" AS "CG_POSITIONBUDGETED", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_candidatepreselected" AS "CG_CANDIDATEPRESELECTED", 
    CASE 
        WHEN "JUSTIFICATIONDESCRIPTION21"."LANGUAGE" = varchar '2' THEN "JUSTIFICATIONDESCRIPTION21"."JUSTIFICATIONDESC"
    END AS "Justification__Requisition_", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_role_type" AS "CG_ROLE_TYPE", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_products" AS "CG_PRODUCTS", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_leadershipdevprogreq" AS "CG_LEADERSHIPDEVPROGREQ", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_leadershipdevstatus" AS "CG_LEADERSHIPDEVSTATUS", 
    "OLFORGANIZATIONDESCOPTI__REQUISITION_"."name2" AS "Business_Unit", 
    "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name2" AS "Primary_Country", 
    "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name3" AS "Primary_State", 
    "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name4" AS "Primary_City", 
    "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name5" AS "Primary_Office_Location", 
    (("ps_department_jdo"."departmentnumber" || varchar ' - ') || "ps_department_jdo"."departmentname") AS "DEPARTMENTNAME1", 
    (("PS_CANDOFR_JDO_Requisition_"."cgps_jobcode" || varchar ' - ') || "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cgps_jobtitle") AS "Requisition_Template", 
    CASE 
        WHEN "ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."LASTNAME" IS NULL THEN NULL
        ELSE TRIM(BOTH FROM ((((NVL("ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."LASTNAME", varchar ' ') || varchar ', ') || NVL("ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."FIRSTNAME", varchar ' ')) || varchar ' ') || NVL("ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."MIDDLEINITIAL", varchar ' ')))
    END AS "HIRING_MGR_ASSISTANT_NAME", 
    CASE 
        WHEN "JOBINFORMATION3"."ISAUTOREJECTFILLED" = 0 THEN varchar 'No'
        ELSE varchar 'Yes'
    END AS "Auto_Reject_Filled", 
    CASE 
        WHEN "JOBINFORMATION3"."ISAUTOREJECTCANCELLED" = 0 THEN varchar 'No'
        ELSE varchar 'Yes'
    END AS "Auto_Reject_Cancelled", 
    CASE 
        WHEN "JOBINFORMATION3"."AUTODECLINECANDIDATES" = 0 THEN varchar 'No'
        ELSE varchar 'Yes'
    END AS "Auto_Decline_Candidates", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_referralplan" AS "CG_REFERRALPLAN", 
    "RSJOBTYPEDESCRIPTION__Requisition_9"."RSJOBTYPEDESC" AS "RSJOBTYPEDESC", 
    "RSJOBLEVELDESCRIPTION_Requisition_4"."RSJOBLEVELDESC" AS "RSJOBLEVELDESC", 
    "RPRESOURCEVALUE16"."VALUE" AS "Travel", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_homebased" AS "CG_HOMEBASED", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_homebased_internal" AS "CG_HOMEBASED_INTERNAL", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cgps_rolesummary" AS "CGPS_ROLESUMMARY", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_eeo" AS "CG_EEO"
FROM
    "HIRETYPE0"
        INNER JOIN "taleo"."rpresource" "RPRESOURCE_Requisition_Type_"
        ON "HIRETYPE0"."RPRESOURCENO" = "RPRESOURCE_Requisition_Type_"."rpresourceno"
            INNER JOIN "JOBINFORMATION3"
            ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."HIRETYPENO" = "HIRETYPE0"."HIRETYPENO"
                INNER JOIN "taleo"."ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo" "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"
                ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."JOBINFORMATIONNO" = "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."jobinformationno"
                    INNER JOIN "RSJOBLEVELDESCRIPTION_Requisition_4"
                    ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."JOBLEVELNO" = "RSJOBLEVELDESCRIPTION_Requisition_4"."RSJOBLEVELNO"
                        INNER JOIN "taleo"."requisition" "REQUISITION7"
                        ON "REQUISITION7"."jobinformationno" = "JOBINFORMATION3"."JOBINFORMATIONNO"
                            INNER JOIN "RSJOBTYPEDESCRIPTION__Requisition_9"
                            ON "RSJOBTYPEDESCRIPTION__Requisition_9"."RSJOBTYPENO" = "JOBINFORMATION3"."JOBTYPENO"
                                LEFT OUTER JOIN "taleo"."ps_candofr_jdo" "PS_CANDOFR_JDO_Requisition_"
                                ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."OFFERNO" = "PS_CANDOFR_JDO_Requisition_"."offerno"
                                    LEFT OUTER JOIN "taleo"."olforganizationdescopti" "OLFORGANIZATIONDESCOPTI__REQUISITION_"
                                    ON "REQUISITION7"."olforganizationno" = "OLFORGANIZATIONDESCOPTI__REQUISITION_"."olforganizationno"
                                        LEFT OUTER JOIN "JOBINFORMATIONDESCRIPTION12"
                                        ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."JOBINFORMATIONNO" = "JOBINFORMATIONDESCRIPTION12"."JOBINFORMATIONNO"
                                            LEFT OUTER JOIN 
                                            "OLFLOCATION__PRIMARY_"
                                                INNER JOIN "taleo"."olflocationdescopti" "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"
                                                ON "OLFLOCATION__PRIMARY_"."OLFLOCATIONNO" = "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."olflocationno"
                                            ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."PRIMARYLOCATIONNO" = "OLFLOCATION__PRIMARY_"."OLFLOCATIONNO"
                                                LEFT OUTER JOIN 
                                                "taleo"."willtravel" "WILLTRAVEL14"
                                                    INNER JOIN "RPRESOURCEVALUE16"
                                                    ON "WILLTRAVEL14"."rpresourceno" = "RPRESOURCEVALUE16"."RPRESOURCENO"
                                                ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."WILLTRAVELNO" = "WILLTRAVEL14"."willtravelno"
                                                    LEFT OUTER JOIN "ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"
                                                    ON "REQUISITION7"."hiringmanagerassistantno" = "ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."ARUSERNO"
                                                        LEFT OUTER JOIN "HIRE_COUNT_"
                                                        ON "REQUISITION7"."requisitionno" = "HIRE_COUNT_"."REQUISITIONNO"
                                                            LEFT OUTER JOIN "JUSTIFICATIONDESCRIPTION21"
                                                            ON "REQUISITION7"."justificationno" = "JUSTIFICATIONDESCRIPTION21"."JUSTIFICATIONNO"
                                                                LEFT OUTER JOIN "taleo"."ps_department_jdo" "ps_department_jdo"
                                                                ON "REQUISITION7"."departmentno" = "ps_department_jdo"."departmentno" 
WHERE 
    "REQUISITION7"."contestnumber" = ? AND
    "JOBINFORMATIONDESCRIPTION12"."LOCALE" = varchar 'en' 
GROUP BY

SELECT
    "JOBINFORMATIONDESCRIPTION12"."TITLE" AS "TITLE", 
    "REQUISITION7"."contestnumber" AS "REQUISITION_ID", 
    concat(concat(concat(concat(concat(concat("OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name2", varchar ' > '), "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name3"), varchar ' > '), "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name4"), varchar ' > '), "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name5") AS "Primary_Location", 
    "RPRESOURCE_Requisition_Type_"."name" AS "Requisition_Type", 
    concat(concat(COALESCE(
        "HIRE_COUNT_"."HIRE_COUNT", 
        0), varchar ' out of '), "JOBINFORMATION3"."NBTOHIRE") AS "Hired_Candidates", 
    "JOBINFORMATION3"."NBTOHIRE" AS "Number_of_Openings", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_psacquisitioncode" AS "CG_PSACQUISITIONCODE", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_positionbudgeted" AS "CG_POSITIONBUDGETED", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_candidatepreselected" AS "CG_CANDIDATEPRESELECTED", 
    CASE 
        WHEN "JUSTIFICATIONDESCRIPTION21"."LANGUAGE" = varchar '2' THEN "JUSTIFICATIONDESCRIPTION21"."JUSTIFICATIONDESC"
    END AS "Justification__Requisition_", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_role_type" AS "CG_ROLE_TYPE", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_products" AS "CG_PRODUCTS", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_leadershipdevprogreq" AS "CG_LEADERSHIPDEVPROGREQ", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_leadershipdevstatus" AS "CG_LEADERSHIPDEVSTATUS", 
    "OLFORGANIZATIONDESCOPTI__REQUISITION_"."name2" AS "Business_Unit", 
    "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name2" AS "Primary_Country", 
    "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name3" AS "Primary_State", 
    "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name4" AS "Primary_City", 
    "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name5" AS "Primary_Office_Location", 
    (("ps_department_jdo"."departmentnumber" || varchar ' - ') || "ps_department_jdo"."departmentname") AS "DEPARTMENTNAME1", 
    (("PS_CANDOFR_JDO_Requisition_"."cgps_jobcode" || varchar ' - ') || "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cgps_jobtitle") AS "Requisition_Template", 
    CASE 
        WHEN "ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."LASTNAME" IS NULL THEN NULL
        ELSE TRIM(BOTH FROM ((((NVL("ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."LASTNAME", varchar ' ') || varchar ', ') || NVL("ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."FIRSTNAME", varchar ' ')) || varchar ' ') || NVL("ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."MIDDLEINITIAL", varchar ' ')))
    END AS "HIRING_MGR_ASSISTANT_NAME", 
    CASE 
        WHEN "JOBINFORMATION3"."ISAUTOREJECTFILLED" = 0 THEN varchar 'No'
        ELSE varchar 'Yes'
    END AS "Auto_Reject_Filled", 
    CASE 
        WHEN "JOBINFORMATION3"."ISAUTOREJECTCANCELLED" = 0 THEN varchar 'No'
        ELSE varchar 'Yes'
    END AS "Auto_Reject_Cancelled", 
    CASE 
        WHEN "JOBINFORMATION3"."AUTODECLINECANDIDATES" = 0 THEN varchar 'No'
        ELSE varchar 'Yes'
    END AS "Auto_Decline_Candidates", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_referralplan" AS "CG_REFERRALPLAN", 
    "RSJOBTYPEDESCRIPTION__Requisition_9"."RSJOBTYPEDESC" AS "RSJOBTYPEDESC", 
    "RSJOBLEVELDESCRIPTION_Requisition_4"."RSJOBLEVELDESC" AS "RSJOBLEVELDESC", 
    "RPRESOURCEVALUE16"."VALUE" AS "Travel", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_homebased" AS "CG_HOMEBASED", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_homebased_internal" AS "CG_HOMEBASED_INTERNAL", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cgps_rolesummary" AS "CGPS_ROLESUMMARY", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_eeo" AS "CG_EEO"
FROM
    "HIRETYPE0"
        INNER JOIN "taleo"."rpresource" "RPRESOURCE_Requisition_Type_"
        ON "HIRETYPE0"."RPRESOURCENO" = "RPRESOURCE_Requisition_Type_"."rpresourceno"
            INNER JOIN "JOBINFORMATION3"
            ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."HIRETYPENO" = "HIRETYPE0"."HIRETYPENO"
                INNER JOIN "taleo"."ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo" "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"
                ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."JOBINFORMATIONNO" = "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."jobinformationno"
                    INNER JOIN "RSJOBLEVELDESCRIPTION_Requisition_4"
                    ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."JOBLEVELNO" = "RSJOBLEVELDESCRIPTION_Requisition_4"."RSJOBLEVELNO"
                        INNER JOIN "taleo"."requisition" "REQUISITION7"
                        ON "REQUISITION7"."jobinformationno" = "JOBINFORMATION3"."JOBINFORMATIONNO"
                            INNER JOIN "RSJOBTYPEDESCRIPTION__Requisition_9"
                            ON "RSJOBTYPEDESCRIPTION__Requisition_9"."RSJOBTYPENO" = "JOBINFORMATION3"."JOBTYPENO"
                                LEFT OUTER JOIN "taleo"."ps_candofr_jdo" "PS_CANDOFR_JDO_Requisition_"
                                ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."OFFERNO" = "PS_CANDOFR_JDO_Requisition_"."offerno"
                                    LEFT OUTER JOIN "taleo"."olforganizationdescopti" "OLFORGANIZATIONDESCOPTI__REQUISITION_"
                                    ON "REQUISITION7"."olforganizationno" = "OLFORGANIZATIONDESCOPTI__REQUISITION_"."olforganizationno"
                                        LEFT OUTER JOIN "JOBINFORMATIONDESCRIPTION12"
                                        ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."JOBINFORMATIONNO" = "JOBINFORMATIONDESCRIPTION12"."JOBINFORMATIONNO"
                                            LEFT OUTER JOIN 
                                            "OLFLOCATION__PRIMARY_"
                                                INNER JOIN "taleo"."olflocationdescopti" "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"
                                                ON "OLFLOCATION__PRIMARY_"."OLFLOCATIONNO" = "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."olflocationno"
                                            ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."PRIMARYLOCATIONNO" = "OLFLOCATION__PRIMARY_"."OLFLOCATIONNO"
                                                LEFT OUTER JOIN 
                                                "taleo"."willtravel" "WILLTRAVEL14"
                                                    INNER JOIN "RPRESOURCEVALUE16"
                                                    ON "WILLTRAVEL14"."rpresourceno" = "RPRESOURCEVALUE16"."RPRESOURCENO"
                                                ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."WILLTRAVELNO" = "WILLTRAVEL14"."willtravelno"
                                                    LEFT OUTER JOIN "ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"
                                                    ON "REQUISITION7"."hiringmanagerassistantno" = "ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."ARUSERNO"
                                                        LEFT OUTER JOIN "HIRE_COUNT_"
                                                        ON "REQUISITION7"."requisitionno" = "HIRE_COUNT_"."REQUISITIONNO"
                                                            LEFT OUTER JOIN "JUSTIFICATIONDESCRIPTION21"
                                                            ON "REQUISITION7"."justificationno" = "JUSTIFICATIONDESCRIPTION21"."JUSTIFICATIONNO"
                                                                LEFT OUTER JOIN "taleo"."ps_department_jdo" "ps_department_jdo"
                                                                ON "REQUISITION7"."departmentno" = "ps_department_jdo"."departmentno" 
WHERE 
    "REQUISITION7"."contestnumber" = ? AND
    "JOBINFORMATIONDESCRIPTION12"."LOCALE" = varchar 'en' 
GROUP BY 
    "JOBINFORMATIONDESCRIPTION12"."TITLE", 
    "REQUISITION7"."contestnumber", 
    concat(concat(concat(concat(concat(concat("OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name2", varchar ' > '), "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name3"), varchar ' > '), "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name4"), varchar ' > '), "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name5"), 
    "RPRESOURCE_Requisition_Type_"."name", 
    concat(concat(COALESCE(
        "HIRE_COUNT_"."HIRE_COUNT", 
        0), varchar ' out of '), "JOBINFORMATION3"."NBTOHIRE"), 
    "JOBINFORMATION3"."NBTOHIRE", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_psacquisitioncode", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_positionbudgeted", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_candidatepreselected", 
    CASE 
        WHEN "JUSTIFICATIONDESCRIPTION21"."LANGUAGE" = varchar '2' THEN "JUSTIFICATIONDESCRIPTION21"."JUSTIFICATIONDESC"
    END, 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_role_type", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_products", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_leadershipdevprogreq", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_leadershipdevstatus", 
    "OLFORGANIZATIONDESCOPTI__REQUISITION_"."name2", 
    "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name2", 
    "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name3", 
    "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name4", 
    "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name5", 
    (("ps_department_jdo"."departmentnumber" || varchar ' - ') || "ps_department_jdo"."departmentname"), 
    (("PS_CANDOFR_JDO_Requisition_"."cgps_jobcode" || varchar ' - ') || "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cgps_jobtitle"), 
    CASE 
        WHEN "ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."LASTNAME" IS NULL THEN NULL
        ELSE TRIM(BOTH FROM ((((NVL("ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."LASTNAME", varchar ' ') || varchar ', ') || NVL("ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."FIRSTNAME", varchar ' ')) || varchar ' ') || NVL("ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."MIDDLEINITIAL", varchar ' ')))
    END, 
    CASE 
        WHEN "JOBINFORMATION3"."ISAUTOREJECTFILLED" = 0 THEN varchar 'No'
        ELSE varchar 'Yes'
    END, 
    CASE 
        WHEN "JOBINFORMATION3"."ISAUTOREJECTCANCELLED" = 0 THEN varchar 'No'
        ELSE varchar 'Yes'
    END, 
    CASE 
        WHEN "JOBINFORMATION3"."AUTODECLINECANDIDATES" = 0 THEN varchar 'No'
        ELSE varchar 'Yes'
    END, 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_referralplan", 
    "RSJOBTYPEDESCRIPTION__Requisition_9"."RSJOBTYPEDESC", 
    "RSJOBLEVELDESCRIPTION_Requisition_4"."RSJOBLEVELDESC", 
    "RPRESOURCEVALUE16"."VALUE", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_homebased", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_homebased_internal", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cgps_rolesummary", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_eeo"

        ELSE TRIM(BOTH FROM ((((NVL("ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."LASTNAME", varchar ' ') || varchar ', ') || NVL("ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."FIRSTNAME", varchar ' ')) || varchar ' ') || NVL("ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."MIDDLEINITIAL", varchar ' ')))

                INNER JOIN "taleo"."ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo" "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"
                ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."JOBINFORMATIONNO" = "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."jobinformationno"
                    INNER JOIN "RSJOBLEVELDESCRIPTION_Requisition_4"
                    ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."JOBLEVELNO" = "RSJOBLEVELDESCRIPTION_Requisition_4"."RSJOBLEVELNO"
                        INNER JOIN "taleo"."requisition" "REQUISITION7"
                        ON "REQUISITION7"."jobinformationno" = "JOBINFORMATION3"."JOBINFORMATIONNO"
                            INNER JOIN "RSJOBTYPEDESCRIPTION__Requisition_9"
                            ON "RSJOBTYPEDESCRIPTION__Requisition_9"."RSJOBTYPENO" = "JOBINFORMATION3"."JOBTYPENO"
                                LEFT OUTER JOIN "taleo"."ps_candofr_jdo" "PS_CANDOFR_JDO_Requisition_"
                                ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."OFFERNO" = "PS_CANDOFR_JDO_Requisition_"."offerno"
                                    LEFT OUTER JOIN "taleo"."olforganizationdescopti" "OLFORGANIZATIONDESCOPTI__REQUISITION_"
                                    ON "REQUISITION7"."olforganizationno" = "OLFORGANIZATIONDESCOPTI__REQUISITION_"."olforganizationno"
                                        LEFT OUTER JOIN "JOBINFORMATIONDESCRIPTION12"
                                        ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."JOBINFORMATIONNO" = "JOBINFORMATIONDESCRIPTION12"."JOBINFORMATIONNO"
                                            LEFT OUTER JOIN 
                                            "OLFLOCATION__PRIMARY_"
                                                INNER JOIN "taleo"."olflocationdescopti" "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"
                                                ON "OLFLOCATION__PRIMARY_"."OLFLOCATIONNO" = "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."olflocationno"
                                            ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."PRIMARYLOCATIONNO" = "OLFLOCATION__PRIMARY_"."OLFLOCATIONNO"
                                                LEFT OUTER JOIN 
                                                "taleo"."willtravel" "WILLTRAVEL14"
                                                    INNER JOIN "RPRESOURCEVALUE16"
                                                    ON "WILLTRAVEL14"."rpresourceno" = "RPRESOURCEVALUE16"."RPRESOURCENO"
                                                ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."WILLTRAVELNO" = "WILLTRAVEL14"."willtravelno"
                                                    LEFT OUTER JOIN "ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"
                                                    ON "REQUISITION7"."hiringmanagerassistantno" = "ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."ARUSERNO"
                                                        LEFT OUTER JOIN "HIRE_COUNT_"
                                                        ON "REQUISITION7"."requisitionno" = "HIRE_COUNT_"."REQUISITIONNO"
                                                            LEFT OUTER JOIN "JUSTIFICATIONDESCRIPTION21"
                                                            ON "REQUISITION7"."justificationno" = "JUSTIFICATIONDESCRIPTION21"."JUSTIFICATIONNO"
                                                                LEFT OUTER JOIN "taleo"."ps_department_jdo" "ps_department_jdo"
                                                                ON "REQUISITION7"."departmentno" = "ps_department_jdo"."departmentno" 
WHERE 
    "REQUISITION7"."contestnumber" = ? AND
    "JOBINFORMATIONDESCRIPTION12"."LOCALE" = varchar 'en' 
GROUP BY 
    "JOBINFORMATIONDESCRIPTION12"."TITLE", 
    "REQUISITION7"."contestnumber", 
    concat(concat(concat(concat(concat(concat("OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name2", varchar ' > '), "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name3"), varchar ' > '), "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name4"), varchar ' > '), "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name5"), 
    "RPRESOURCE_Requisition_Type_"."name", 
    concat(concat(COALESCE(
        "HIRE_COUNT_"."HIRE_COUNT", 
        0), varchar ' out of '), "JOBINFORMATION3"."NBTOHIRE"), 
    "JOBINFORMATION3"."NBTOHIRE", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_psacquisitioncode", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_positionbudgeted", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_candidatepreselected", 
    CASE 
        WHEN "JUSTIFICATIONDESCRIPTION21"."LANGUAGE" = varchar '2' THEN "JUSTIFICATIONDESCRIPTION21"."JUSTIFICATIONDESC"
    END, 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_role_type", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_products", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_leadershipdevprogreq", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_leadershipdevstatus", 
    "OLFORGANIZATIONDESCOPTI__REQUISITION_"."name2", 
    "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name2", 
    "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name3", 
    "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name4", 
    "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name5", 
    (("ps_department_jdo"."departmentnumber" || varchar ' - ') || "ps_department_jdo"."departmentname"), 
    (("PS_CANDOFR_JDO_Requisition_"."cgps_jobcode" || varchar ' - ') || "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cgps_jobtitle"), 
    CASE 
        WHEN "ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."LASTNAME" IS NULL THEN NULL
        ELSE TRIM(BOTH FROM ((((NVL("ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."LASTNAME", varchar ' ') || varchar ', ') || NVL("ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."FIRSTNAME", varchar ' ')) || varchar ' ') || NVL("ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."MIDDLEINITIAL", varchar ' ')))
    END, 
    CASE 
        WHEN "JOBINFORMATION3"."ISAUTOREJECTFILLED" = 0 THEN varchar 'No'
        ELSE varchar 'Yes'
    END, 
    CASE 
        WHEN "JOBINFORMATION3"."ISAUTOREJECTCANCELLED" = 0 THEN varchar 'No'
        ELSE varchar 'Yes'
    END, 
    CASE 
        WHEN "JOBINFORMATION3"."AUTODECLINECANDIDATES" = 0 THEN varchar 'No'
        ELSE varchar 'Yes'
    END, 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_referralplan", 
    "RSJOBTYPEDESCRIPTION__Requisition_9"."RSJOBTYPEDESC", 
    "RSJOBLEVELDESCRIPTION_Requisition_4"."RSJOBLEVELDESC", 
    "RPRESOURCEVALUE16"."VALUE", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_homebased", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_homebased_internal", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cgps_rolesummary", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_eeo"

WITH 
"HIRETYPE0" AS

    SELECT

"RSJOBLEVELDESCRIPTION_Requisition_4" AS

    FROM

"OLFLOCATION__PRIMARY_" AS

        "olflocation"."olflocationno" AS "OLFLOCATIONNO",

"RPRESOURCEVALUE16" AS

        "rpresourcevalue"."rpresourceno" AS "RPRESOURCENO",

    FROM
        "taleo"."rpresourcevalue" "rpresourcevalue" 
    WHERE

        "rpresourcevalue"."locale" = varchar 'en'
    ), 
"ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_" AS 
    (
    SELECT

        "aruser"."pager" AS "PAGER", 
        "aruser"."fax" AS "FAX", 
        "aruser"."streetaddress" AS "STREETADDRESS",

        "aruser"."state" AS "STATE", 
        "aruser"."country" AS "COUNTRY",

"HIRE_COUNT_" AS 
    (
    SELECT
        "rcapplication"."requisitionno" AS "REQUISITIONNO", 
        COUNT(DISTINCT "rcapplication"."rcapplicationno") AS "HIRE_COUNT"
    FROM
        "taleo"."rcapplication" 
    WHERE 
        "rcapplication"."applicationstateno" = 6 AND
        "rcapplication"."entitystatusno" = 0 
    GROUP BY 
        "rcapplication"."requisitionno"
    ), 
"JUSTIFICATIONDESCRIPTION21" AS 
    (
    SELECT
        "justificationdescription"."justificationno" AS "JUSTIFICATIONNO", 
        "justificationdescription"."language" AS "LANGUAGE", 
        "justificationdescription"."justificationdesc" AS "JUSTIFICATIONDESC"
    FROM
        "taleo"."justificationdescription" 
    WHERE 
        "justificationdescription"."language" = 2
    )
SELECT
    "JOBINFORMATIONDESCRIPTION12"."TITLE" AS "TITLE", 
    "REQUISITION7"."contestnumber" AS "REQUISITION_ID", 
    concat(concat(concat(concat(concat(concat("OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name2", varchar ' > '), "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name3"), varchar ' > '), "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name4"), varchar ' > '), "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name5") AS "Primary_Location", 
    "RPRESOURCE_Requisition_Type_"."name" AS "Requisition_Type", 
    concat(concat(COALESCE(
        "HIRE_COUNT_"."HIRE_COUNT", 
        0), varchar ' out of '), "JOBINFORMATION3"."NBTOHIRE") AS "Hired_Candidates", 
    "JOBINFORMATION3"."NBTOHIRE" AS "Number_of_Openings", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_psacquisitioncode" AS "CG_PSACQUISITIONCODE", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_positionbudgeted" AS "CG_POSITIONBUDGETED", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_candidatepreselected" AS "CG_CANDIDATEPRESELECTED", 
    CASE 
        WHEN "JUSTIFICATIONDESCRIPTION21"."LANGUAGE" = varchar '2' THEN "JUSTIFICATIONDESCRIPTION21"."JUSTIFICATIONDESC"
    END AS "Justification__Requisition_", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_role_type" AS "CG_ROLE_TYPE", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_products" AS "CG_PRODUCTS", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_leadershipdevprogreq" AS "CG_LEADERSHIPDEVPROGREQ", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_leadershipdevstatus" AS "CG_LEADERSHIPDEVSTATUS", 
    "OLFORGANIZATIONDESCOPTI__REQUISITION_"."name2" AS "Business_Unit", 
    "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name2" AS "Primary_Country", 
    "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name3" AS "Primary_State", 
    "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name4" AS "Primary_City", 
    "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name5" AS "Primary_Office_Location", 
    (("ps_department_jdo"."departmentnumber" || varchar ' - ') || "ps_department_jdo"."departmentname") AS "DEPARTMENTNAME1", 
    (("PS_CANDOFR_JDO_Requisition_"."cgps_jobcode" || varchar ' - ') || "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cgps_jobtitle") AS "Requisition_Template", 
    CASE 
        WHEN "ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."LASTNAME" IS NULL THEN NULL
        ELSE TRIM(BOTH FROM ((((NVL("ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."LASTNAME", varchar ' ') || varchar ', ') || NVL("ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."FIRSTNAME", varchar ' ')) || varchar ' ') || NVL("ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."MIDDLEINITIAL", varchar ' ')))
    END AS "HIRING_MGR_ASSISTANT_NAME", 
    CASE 
        WHEN "JOBINFORMATION3"."ISAUTOREJECTFILLED" = 0 THEN varchar 'No'
        ELSE varchar 'Yes'
    END AS "Auto_Reject_Filled", 
    CASE 
        WHEN "JOBINFORMATION3"."ISAUTOREJECTCANCELLED" = 0 THEN varchar 'No'
        ELSE varchar 'Yes'
    END AS "Auto_Reject_Cancelled", 
    CASE 
        WHEN "JOBINFORMATION3"."AUTODECLINECANDIDATES" = 0 THEN varchar 'No'
        ELSE varchar 'Yes'
    END AS "Auto_Decline_Candidates", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_referralplan" AS "CG_REFERRALPLAN", 
    "RSJOBTYPEDESCRIPTION__Requisition_9"."RSJOBTYPEDESC" AS "RSJOBTYPEDESC", 
    "RSJOBLEVELDESCRIPTION_Requisition_4"."RSJOBLEVELDESC" AS "RSJOBLEVELDESC", 
    "RPRESOURCEVALUE16"."VALUE" AS "Travel", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_homebased" AS "CG_HOMEBASED", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_homebased_internal" AS "CG_HOMEBASED_INTERNAL", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cgps_rolesummary" AS "CGPS_ROLESUMMARY", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_eeo" AS "CG_EEO"
FROM
    "HIRETYPE0"
        INNER JOIN "taleo"."rpresource" "RPRESOURCE_Requisition_Type_"
        ON "HIRETYPE0"."RPRESOURCENO" = "RPRESOURCE_Requisition_Type_"."rpresourceno"
            INNER JOIN "JOBINFORMATION3"
            ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."HIRETYPENO" = "HIRETYPE0"."HIRETYPENO"
                INNER JOIN "taleo"."ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo" "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"
                ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."JOBINFORMATIONNO" = "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."jobinformationno"
                    INNER JOIN "RSJOBLEVELDESCRIPTION_Requisition_4"
                    ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."JOBLEVELNO" = "RSJOBLEVELDESCRIPTION_Requisition_4"."RSJOBLEVELNO"
                        INNER JOIN "taleo"."requisition" "REQUISITION7"
                        ON "REQUISITION7"."jobinformationno" = "JOBINFORMATION3"."JOBINFORMATIONNO"
                            INNER JOIN "RSJOBTYPEDESCRIPTION__Requisition_9"
                            ON "RSJOBTYPEDESCRIPTION__Requisition_9"."RSJOBTYPENO" = "JOBINFORMATION3"."JOBTYPENO"
                                LEFT OUTER JOIN "taleo"."ps_candofr_jdo" "PS_CANDOFR_JDO_Requisition_"
                                ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."OFFERNO" = "PS_CANDOFR_JDO_Requisition_"."offerno"
                                    LEFT OUTER JOIN "taleo"."olforganizationdescopti" "OLFORGANIZATIONDESCOPTI__REQUISITION_"
                                    ON "REQUISITION7"."olforganizationno" = "OLFORGANIZATIONDESCOPTI__REQUISITION_"."olforganizationno"
                                        LEFT OUTER JOIN "JOBINFORMATIONDESCRIPTION12"
                                        ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."JOBINFORMATIONNO" = "JOBINFORMATIONDESCRIPTION12"."JOBINFORMATIONNO"
                                            LEFT OUTER JOIN 
                                            "OLFLOCATION__PRIMARY_"
                                                INNER JOIN "taleo"."olflocationdescopti" "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"
                                                ON "OLFLOCATION__PRIMARY_"."OLFLOCATIONNO" = "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."olflocationno"
                                            ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."PRIMARYLOCATIONNO" = "OLFLOCATION__PRIMARY_"."OLFLOCATIONNO"
                                                LEFT OUTER JOIN 
                                                "taleo"."willtravel" "WILLTRAVEL14"
                                                    INNER JOIN "RPRESOURCEVALUE16"
                                                    ON "WILLTRAVEL14"."rpresourceno" = "RPRESOURCEVALUE16"."RPRESOURCENO"
                                                ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."WILLTRAVELNO" = "WILLTRAVEL14"."willtravelno"
                                                    LEFT OUTER JOIN "ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"
                                                    ON "REQUISITION7"."hiringmanagerassistantno" = "ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."ARUSERNO"
                                                        LEFT OUTER JOIN "HIRE_COUNT_"
                                                        ON "REQUISITION7"."requisitionno" = "HIRE_COUNT_"."REQUISITIONNO"
                                                            LEFT OUTER JOIN "JUSTIFICATIONDESCRIPTION21"
                                                            ON "REQUISITION7"."justificationno" = "JUSTIFICATIONDESCRIPTION21"."JUSTIFICATIONNO"
                                                                LEFT OUTER JOIN "taleo"."ps_department_jdo" "ps_department_jdo"
                                                                ON "REQUISITION7"."departmentno" = "ps_department_jdo"."departmentno" 
WHERE 
    "REQUISITION7"."contestnumber" = ? AND
    "JOBINFORMATIONDESCRIPTION12"."LOCALE" = varchar 'en' 
GROUP BY 
    "JOBINFORMATIONDESCRIPTION12"."TITLE", 
    "REQUISITION7"."contestnumber", 
    concat(concat(concat(concat(concat(concat("OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name2", varchar ' > '), "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name3"), varchar ' > '), "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name4"), varchar ' > '), "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name5"), 
    "RPRESOURCE_Requisition_Type_"."name", 
    concat(concat(COALESCE(
        "HIRE_COUNT_"."HIRE_COUNT", 
        0), varchar ' out of '), "JOBINFORMATION3"."NBTOHIRE"), 
    "JOBINFORMATION3"."NBTOHIRE", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_psacquisitioncode", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_positionbudgeted", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_candidatepreselected", 
    CASE

    END AS "Justification__Requisition_",

    (("PS_CANDOFR_JDO_Requisition_"."cgps_jobcode" || varchar ' - ') || "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cgps_jobtitle") AS "Requisition_Template", 
    CASE 
        WHEN "ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."LASTNAME" IS NULL THEN NULL
        ELSE TRIM(BOTH FROM ((((NVL("ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."LASTNAME", varchar ' ') || varchar ', ') || NVL("ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."FIRSTNAME", varchar ' ')) || varchar ' ') || NVL("ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."MIDDLEINITIAL", varchar ' ')))
    END AS "HIRING_MGR_ASSISTANT_NAME", 
    CASE 
        WHEN "JOBINFORMATION3"."ISAUTOREJECTFILLED" = 0 THEN varchar 'No'
        ELSE varchar 'Yes'
    END AS "Auto_Reject_Filled", 
    CASE 
        WHEN "JOBINFORMATION3"."ISAUTOREJECTCANCELLED" = 0 THEN varchar 'No'
        ELSE varchar 'Yes'
    END AS "Auto_Reject_Cancelled", 
    CASE 
        WHEN "JOBINFORMATION3"."AUTODECLINECANDIDATES" = 0 THEN varchar 'No'
        ELSE varchar 'Yes'
    END AS "Auto_Decline_Candidates", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_referralplan" AS "CG_REFERRALPLAN", 
    "RSJOBTYPEDESCRIPTION__Requisition_9"."RSJOBTYPEDESC" AS "RSJOBTYPEDESC", 
    "RSJOBLEVELDESCRIPTION_Requisition_4"."RSJOBLEVELDESC" AS "RSJOBLEVELDESC", 
    "RPRESOURCEVALUE16"."VALUE" AS "Travel", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_homebased" AS "CG_HOMEBASED", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_homebased_internal" AS "CG_HOMEBASED_INTERNAL", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cgps_rolesummary" AS "CGPS_ROLESUMMARY", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_eeo" AS "CG_EEO"
FROM
    "HIRETYPE0"
        INNER JOIN "taleo"."rpresource" "RPRESOURCE_Requisition_Type_"
        ON "HIRETYPE0"."RPRESOURCENO" = "RPRESOURCE_Requisition_Type_"."rpresourceno"
            INNER JOIN "JOBINFORMATION3"
            ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."HIRETYPENO" = "HIRETYPE0"."HIRETYPENO"
                INNER JOIN "taleo"."ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo" "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"
                ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."JOBINFORMATIONNO" = "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."jobinformationno"
                    INNER JOIN "RSJOBLEVELDESCRIPTION_Requisition_4"
                    ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."JOBLEVELNO" = "RSJOBLEVELDESCRIPTION_Requisition_4"."RSJOBLEVELNO"
                        INNER JOIN "taleo"."requisition" "REQUISITION7"
                        ON "REQUISITION7"."jobinformationno" = "JOBINFORMATION3"."JOBINFORMATIONNO"
                            INNER JOIN "RSJOBTYPEDESCRIPTION__Requisition_9"
                            ON "RSJOBTYPEDESCRIPTION__Requisition_9"."RSJOBTYPENO" = "JOBINFORMATION3"."JOBTYPENO"
                                LEFT OUTER JOIN "taleo"."ps_candofr_jdo" "PS_CANDOFR_JDO_Requisition_"
                                ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."OFFERNO" = "PS_CANDOFR_JDO_Requisition_"."offerno"
                                    LEFT OUTER JOIN "taleo"."olforganizationdescopti" "OLFORGANIZATIONDESCOPTI__REQUISITION_"
                                    ON "REQUISITION7"."olforganizationno" = "OLFORGANIZATIONDESCOPTI__REQUISITION_"."olforganizationno"
                                        LEFT OUTER JOIN "JOBINFORMATIONDESCRIPTION12"
                                        ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."JOBINFORMATIONNO" = "JOBINFORMATIONDESCRIPTION12"."JOBINFORMATIONNO"
                                            LEFT OUTER JOIN 
                                            "OLFLOCATION__PRIMARY_"
                                                INNER JOIN "taleo"."olflocationdescopti" "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"
                                                ON "OLFLOCATION__PRIMARY_"."OLFLOCATIONNO" = "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."olflocationno"
                                            ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."PRIMARYLOCATIONNO" = "OLFLOCATION__PRIMARY_"."OLFLOCATIONNO"
                                                LEFT OUTER JOIN 
                                                "taleo"."willtravel" "WILLTRAVEL14"
                                                    INNER JOIN "RPRESOURCEVALUE16"
                                                    ON "WILLTRAVEL14"."rpresourceno" = "RPRESOURCEVALUE16"."RPRESOURCENO"
                                                ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."WILLTRAVELNO" = "WILLTRAVEL14"."willtravelno"
                                                    LEFT OUTER JOIN "ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"
                                                    ON "REQUISITION7"."hiringmanagerassistantno" = "ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."ARUSERNO"
                                                        LEFT OUTER JOIN "HIRE_COUNT_"
                                                        ON "REQUISITION7"."requisitionno" = "HIRE_COUNT_"."REQUISITIONNO"
                                                            LEFT OUTER JOIN "JUSTIFICATIONDESCRIPTION21"
                                                            ON "REQUISITION7"."justificationno" = "JUSTIFICATIONDESCRIPTION21"."JUSTIFICATIONNO"
                                                                LEFT OUTER JOIN "taleo"."ps_department_jdo" "ps_department_jdo"
                                                                ON "REQUISITION7"."departmentno" = "ps_department_jdo"."departmentno" 
WHERE 
    "REQUISITION7"."contestnumber" = ? AND
    "JOBINFORMATIONDESCRIPTION12"."LOCALE" = varchar 'en' 
GROUP BY

    "REQUISITION7"."contestnumber", 
    concat(concat(concat(concat(concat(concat("OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name2", varchar ' > '), "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name3"), varchar ' > '), "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name4"), varchar ' > '), "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name5"), 
    "RPRESOURCE_Requisition_Type_"."name",

        "HIRE_COUNT_"."HIRE_COUNT",

    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_psacquisitioncode", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_positionbudgeted", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_candidatepreselected",

    END,
