    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_products", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_leadershipdevprogreq", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_leadershipdevstatus", 
    "OLFORGANIZATIONDESCOPTI__REQUISITION_"."name2", 
    "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name2", 
    "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name3", 
    "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name4", 
    "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name5", 
    (("ps_department_jdo"."departmentnumber" || varchar ' - ') || "ps_department_jdo"."departmentname"), 
    (("PS_CANDOFR_JDO_Requisition_"."cgps_jobcode" || varchar ' - ') || "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cgps_jobtitle"), 
    CASE 
        WHEN "ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."LASTNAME" IS NULL THEN NULL
        ELSE TRIM(BOTH FROM ((((NVL("ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."LASTNAME", varchar ' ') || varchar ', ') || NVL("ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."FIRSTNAME", varchar ' ')) || varchar ' ') || NVL("ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."MIDDLEINITIAL", varchar ' ')))
    END, 
    CASE 
        WHEN "JOBINFORMATION3"."ISAUTOREJECTFILLED" = 0 THEN varchar 'No'
        ELSE varchar 'Yes'
    END, 
    CASE 
        WHEN "JOBINFORMATION3"."ISAUTOREJECTCANCELLED" = 0 THEN varchar 'No'
        ELSE varchar 'Yes'
    END, 
    CASE 
        WHEN "JOBINFORMATION3"."AUTODECLINECANDIDATES" = 0 THEN varchar 'No'
        ELSE varchar 'Yes'
    END, 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_referralplan", 
    "RSJOBTYPEDESCRIPTION__Requisition_9"."RSJOBTYPEDESC", 
    "RSJOBLEVELDESCRIPTION_Requisition_4"."RSJOBLEVELDESC", 
    "RPRESOURCEVALUE16"."VALUE", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_homebased", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_homebased_internal",

    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_eeo"

        INNER JOIN "taleo"."rpresource" "RPRESOURCE_Requisition_Type_"
        ON "HIRETYPE0"."RPRESOURCENO" = "RPRESOURCE_Requisition_Type_"."rpresourceno"
            INNER JOIN "JOBINFORMATION3"

                INNER JOIN "taleo"."ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo" "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"
                ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."JOBINFORMATIONNO" = "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."jobinformationno"
                    INNER JOIN "RSJOBLEVELDESCRIPTION_Requisition_4"
                    ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."JOBLEVELNO" = "RSJOBLEVELDESCRIPTION_Requisition_4"."RSJOBLEVELNO"
                        INNER JOIN "taleo"."requisition" "REQUISITION7"
                        ON "REQUISITION7"."jobinformationno" = "JOBINFORMATION3"."JOBINFORMATIONNO"
                            INNER JOIN "RSJOBTYPEDESCRIPTION__Requisition_9"
                            ON "RSJOBTYPEDESCRIPTION__Requisition_9"."RSJOBTYPENO" = "JOBINFORMATION3"."JOBTYPENO"
                                LEFT OUTER JOIN "taleo"."ps_candofr_jdo" "PS_CANDOFR_JDO_Requisition_"
                                ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."OFFERNO" = "PS_CANDOFR_JDO_Requisition_"."offerno"
                                    LEFT OUTER JOIN "taleo"."olforganizationdescopti" "OLFORGANIZATIONDESCOPTI__REQUISITION_"
                                    ON "REQUISITION7"."olforganizationno" = "OLFORGANIZATIONDESCOPTI__REQUISITION_"."olforganizationno"
                                        LEFT OUTER JOIN "JOBINFORMATIONDESCRIPTION12"
                                        ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."JOBINFORMATIONNO" = "JOBINFORMATIONDESCRIPTION12"."JOBINFORMATIONNO"
                                            LEFT OUTER JOIN 
                                            "OLFLOCATION__PRIMARY_"
                                                INNER JOIN "taleo"."olflocationdescopti" "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"
                                                ON "OLFLOCATION__PRIMARY_"."OLFLOCATIONNO" = "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."olflocationno"

                                                LEFT OUTER JOIN

                                                    ON "WILLTRAVEL14"."rpresourceno" = "RPRESOURCEVALUE16"."RPRESOURCENO"

                                                    LEFT OUTER JOIN "ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"

WHERE

GROUP BY

    CASE 
        WHEN "ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."LASTNAME" IS NULL THEN NULL
        ELSE TRIM(BOTH FROM ((((NVL("ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."LASTNAME", varchar ' ') || varchar ', ') || NVL("ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."FIRSTNAME", varchar ' ')) || varchar ' ') || NVL("ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."MIDDLEINITIAL", varchar ' ')))
    END, 
    CASE 
        WHEN "JOBINFORMATION3"."ISAUTOREJECTFILLED" = 0 THEN varchar 'No'
        ELSE varchar 'Yes'
    END, 
    CASE

        ELSE varchar 'Yes'
    END, 
    CASE 
        WHEN "JOBINFORMATION3"."AUTODECLINECANDIDATES" = 0 THEN varchar 'No'
        ELSE varchar 'Yes'

        "HIRE_COUNT_"."HIRE_COUNT",

    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_psacquisitioncode" AS "CG_PSACQUISITIONCODE",

    END AS "Justification__Requisition_", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_role_type" AS "CG_ROLE_TYPE",

    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_leadershipdevstatus" AS "CG_LEADERSHIPDEVSTATUS",

    "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name3" AS "Primary_State", 
    "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name4" AS "Primary_City", 
    "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name5" AS "Primary_Office_Location", 
    (("ps_department_jdo"."departmentnumber" || varchar ' - ') || "ps_department_jdo"."departmentname") AS "DEPARTMENTNAME1", 
    (("PS_CANDOFR_JDO_Requisition_"."cgps_jobcode" || varchar ' - ') || "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cgps_jobtitle") AS "Requisition_Template", 
    CASE 
        WHEN "ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."LASTNAME" IS NULL THEN NULL
        ELSE TRIM(BOTH FROM ((((NVL("ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."LASTNAME", varchar ' ') || varchar ', ') || NVL("ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."FIRSTNAME", varchar ' ')) || varchar ' ') || NVL("ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."MIDDLEINITIAL", varchar ' ')))
    END AS "HIRING_MGR_ASSISTANT_NAME", 
    CASE 
        WHEN "JOBINFORMATION3"."ISAUTOREJECTFILLED" = 0 THEN varchar 'No'

    END AS "Auto_Reject_Filled", 
    CASE 
        WHEN "JOBINFORMATION3"."ISAUTOREJECTCANCELLED" = 0 THEN varchar 'No'
        ELSE varchar 'Yes'
    END AS "Auto_Reject_Cancelled", 
    CASE 
        WHEN "JOBINFORMATION3"."AUTODECLINECANDIDATES" = 0 THEN varchar 'No'
        ELSE varchar 'Yes'
    END AS "Auto_Decline_Candidates", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_referralplan" AS "CG_REFERRALPLAN", 
    "RSJOBTYPEDESCRIPTION__Requisition_9"."RSJOBTYPEDESC" AS "RSJOBTYPEDESC", 
    "RSJOBLEVELDESCRIPTION_Requisition_4"."RSJOBLEVELDESC" AS "RSJOBLEVELDESC",

    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_homebased" AS "CG_HOMEBASED",

    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cgps_rolesummary" AS "CGPS_ROLESUMMARY", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_eeo" AS "CG_EEO"
FROM
    "HIRETYPE0"
        INNER JOIN "taleo"."rpresource" "RPRESOURCE_Requisition_Type_"
        ON "HIRETYPE0"."RPRESOURCENO" = "RPRESOURCE_Requisition_Type_"."rpresourceno"
            INNER JOIN "JOBINFORMATION3"
            ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."HIRETYPENO" = "HIRETYPE0"."HIRETYPENO"
                INNER JOIN "taleo"."ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo" "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"
                ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."JOBINFORMATIONNO" = "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."jobinformationno"
                    INNER JOIN "RSJOBLEVELDESCRIPTION_Requisition_4"
                    ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."JOBLEVELNO" = "RSJOBLEVELDESCRIPTION_Requisition_4"."RSJOBLEVELNO"
                        INNER JOIN "taleo"."requisition" "REQUISITION7"
                        ON "REQUISITION7"."jobinformationno" = "JOBINFORMATION3"."JOBINFORMATIONNO"
                            INNER JOIN "RSJOBTYPEDESCRIPTION__Requisition_9"
                            ON "RSJOBTYPEDESCRIPTION__Requisition_9"."RSJOBTYPENO" = "JOBINFORMATION3"."JOBTYPENO"
                                LEFT OUTER JOIN "taleo"."ps_candofr_jdo" "PS_CANDOFR_JDO_Requisition_"
                                ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."OFFERNO" = "PS_CANDOFR_JDO_Requisition_"."offerno"
                                    LEFT OUTER JOIN "taleo"."olforganizationdescopti" "OLFORGANIZATIONDESCOPTI__REQUISITION_"
                                    ON "REQUISITION7"."olforganizationno" = "OLFORGANIZATIONDESCOPTI__REQUISITION_"."olforganizationno"
                                        LEFT OUTER JOIN "JOBINFORMATIONDESCRIPTION12"
                                        ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."JOBINFORMATIONNO" = "JOBINFORMATIONDESCRIPTION12"."JOBINFORMATIONNO"
                                            LEFT OUTER JOIN 
                                            "OLFLOCATION__PRIMARY_"
                                                INNER JOIN "taleo"."olflocationdescopti" "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"
                                                ON "OLFLOCATION__PRIMARY_"."OLFLOCATIONNO" = "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."olflocationno"
                                            ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."PRIMARYLOCATIONNO" = "OLFLOCATION__PRIMARY_"."OLFLOCATIONNO"
                                                LEFT OUTER JOIN

                                                    INNER JOIN "RPRESOURCEVALUE16"
                                                    ON "WILLTRAVEL14"."rpresourceno" = "RPRESOURCEVALUE16"."RPRESOURCENO"
                                                ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."WILLTRAVELNO" = "WILLTRAVEL14"."willtravelno"
                                                    LEFT OUTER JOIN "ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"

                                                        LEFT OUTER JOIN "HIRE_COUNT_"
                                                        ON "REQUISITION7"."requisitionno" = "HIRE_COUNT_"."REQUISITIONNO"
                                                            LEFT OUTER JOIN "JUSTIFICATIONDESCRIPTION21"
                                                            ON "REQUISITION7"."justificationno" = "JUSTIFICATIONDESCRIPTION21"."JUSTIFICATIONNO"
                                                                LEFT OUTER JOIN "taleo"."ps_department_jdo" "ps_department_jdo"
                                                                ON "REQUISITION7"."departmentno" = "ps_department_jdo"."departmentno" 
WHERE 
    "REQUISITION7"."contestnumber" = ? AND
    "JOBINFORMATIONDESCRIPTION12"."LOCALE" = varchar 'en' 
GROUP BY 
    "JOBINFORMATIONDESCRIPTION12"."TITLE", 
    "REQUISITION7"."contestnumber", 
    concat(concat(concat(concat(concat(concat("OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name2", varchar ' > '), "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name3"), varchar ' > '), "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name4"), varchar ' > '), "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name5"), 
    "RPRESOURCE_Requisition_Type_"."name", 
    concat(concat(COALESCE(
        "HIRE_COUNT_"."HIRE_COUNT", 
        0), varchar ' out of '), "JOBINFORMATION3"."NBTOHIRE"), 
    "JOBINFORMATION3"."NBTOHIRE", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_psacquisitioncode", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_positionbudgeted", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_candidatepreselected", 
    CASE 
        WHEN "JUSTIFICATIONDESCRIPTION21"."LANGUAGE" = varchar '2' THEN "JUSTIFICATIONDESCRIPTION21"."JUSTIFICATIONDESC"
    END, 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_role_type", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_products", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_leadershipdevprogreq", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_leadershipdevstatus", 
    "OLFORGANIZATIONDESCOPTI__REQUISITION_"."name2", 
    "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name2", 
    "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name3", 
    "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name4", 
    "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name5",

    (("PS_CANDOFR_JDO_Requisition_"."cgps_jobcode" || varchar ' - ') || "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cgps_jobtitle"), 
    CASE 
        WHEN "ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."LASTNAME" IS NULL THEN NULL
        ELSE TRIM(BOTH FROM ((((NVL("ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."LASTNAME", varchar ' ') || varchar ', ') || NVL("ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."FIRSTNAME", varchar ' ')) || varchar ' ') || NVL("ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."MIDDLEINITIAL", varchar ' ')))
    END, 
    CASE 
        WHEN "JOBINFORMATION3"."ISAUTOREJECTFILLED" = 0 THEN varchar 'No'
        ELSE varchar 'Yes'
    END, 
    CASE 
        WHEN "JOBINFORMATION3"."ISAUTOREJECTCANCELLED" = 0 THEN varchar 'No'
        ELSE varchar 'Yes'
    END, 
    CASE 
        WHEN "JOBINFORMATION3"."AUTODECLINECANDIDATES" = 0 THEN varchar 'No'
        ELSE varchar 'Yes'
    END, 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_referralplan", 
    "RSJOBTYPEDESCRIPTION__Requisition_9"."RSJOBTYPEDESC", 
    "RSJOBLEVELDESCRIPTION_Requisition_4"."RSJOBLEVELDESC", 
    "RPRESOURCEVALUE16"."VALUE", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_homebased", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_homebased_internal", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cgps_rolesummary", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_eeo"

WITH

"HIRE_COUNT_" AS

"JUSTIFICATIONDESCRIPTION21" AS

SELECT
    "JOBINFORMATIONDESCRIPTION12"."TITLE" AS "TITLE", 
    "REQUISITION7"."contestnumber" AS "REQUISITION_ID", 
    concat(concat(concat(concat(concat(concat("OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name2", varchar ' > '), "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name3"), varchar ' > '), "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name4"), varchar ' > '), "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name5") AS "Primary_Location", 
    "RPRESOURCE_Requisition_Type_"."name" AS "Requisition_Type", 
    concat(concat(COALESCE(
        "HIRE_COUNT_"."HIRE_COUNT", 
        0), varchar ' out of '), "JOBINFORMATION3"."NBTOHIRE") AS "Hired_Candidates", 
    "JOBINFORMATION3"."NBTOHIRE" AS "Number_of_Openings", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_psacquisitioncode" AS "CG_PSACQUISITIONCODE", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_positionbudgeted" AS "CG_POSITIONBUDGETED", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_candidatepreselected" AS "CG_CANDIDATEPRESELECTED", 
    CASE 
        WHEN "JUSTIFICATIONDESCRIPTION21"."LANGUAGE" = varchar '2' THEN "JUSTIFICATIONDESCRIPTION21"."JUSTIFICATIONDESC"
    END AS "Justification__Requisition_", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_role_type" AS "CG_ROLE_TYPE", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_products" AS "CG_PRODUCTS", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_leadershipdevprogreq" AS "CG_LEADERSHIPDEVPROGREQ", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_leadershipdevstatus" AS "CG_LEADERSHIPDEVSTATUS", 
    "OLFORGANIZATIONDESCOPTI__REQUISITION_"."name2" AS "Business_Unit", 
    "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name2" AS "Primary_Country", 
    "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name3" AS "Primary_State", 
    "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name4" AS "Primary_City", 
    "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name5" AS "Primary_Office_Location", 
    (("ps_department_jdo"."departmentnumber" || varchar ' - ') || "ps_department_jdo"."departmentname") AS "DEPARTMENTNAME1", 
    (("PS_CANDOFR_JDO_Requisition_"."cgps_jobcode" || varchar ' - ') || "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cgps_jobtitle") AS "Requisition_Template", 
    CASE 
        WHEN "ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."LASTNAME" IS NULL THEN NULL
        ELSE TRIM(BOTH FROM ((((NVL("ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."LASTNAME", varchar ' ') || varchar ', ') || NVL("ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."FIRSTNAME", varchar ' ')) || varchar ' ') || NVL("ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."MIDDLEINITIAL", varchar ' ')))
    END AS "HIRING_MGR_ASSISTANT_NAME", 
    CASE 
        WHEN "JOBINFORMATION3"."ISAUTOREJECTFILLED" = 0 THEN varchar 'No'
        ELSE varchar 'Yes'
    END AS "Auto_Reject_Filled", 
    CASE 
        WHEN "JOBINFORMATION3"."ISAUTOREJECTCANCELLED" = 0 THEN varchar 'No'
        ELSE varchar 'Yes'
    END AS "Auto_Reject_Cancelled", 
    CASE 
        WHEN "JOBINFORMATION3"."AUTODECLINECANDIDATES" = 0 THEN varchar 'No'
        ELSE varchar 'Yes'
    END AS "Auto_Decline_Candidates", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_referralplan" AS "CG_REFERRALPLAN", 
    "RSJOBTYPEDESCRIPTION__Requisition_9"."RSJOBTYPEDESC" AS "RSJOBTYPEDESC", 
    "RSJOBLEVELDESCRIPTION_Requisition_4"."RSJOBLEVELDESC" AS "RSJOBLEVELDESC", 
    "RPRESOURCEVALUE16"."VALUE" AS "Travel", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_homebased" AS "CG_HOMEBASED", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_homebased_internal" AS "CG_HOMEBASED_INTERNAL", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cgps_rolesummary" AS "CGPS_ROLESUMMARY", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_eeo" AS "CG_EEO"
FROM
    "HIRETYPE0"
        INNER JOIN "taleo"."rpresource" "RPRESOURCE_Requisition_Type_"
        ON "HIRETYPE0"."RPRESOURCENO" = "RPRESOURCE_Requisition_Type_"."rpresourceno"
            INNER JOIN "JOBINFORMATION3"
            ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."HIRETYPENO" = "HIRETYPE0"."HIRETYPENO"
                INNER JOIN "taleo"."ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo" "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"
                ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."JOBINFORMATIONNO" = "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."jobinformationno"
                    INNER JOIN "RSJOBLEVELDESCRIPTION_Requisition_4"
                    ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."JOBLEVELNO" = "RSJOBLEVELDESCRIPTION_Requisition_4"."RSJOBLEVELNO"
                        INNER JOIN "taleo"."requisition" "REQUISITION7"
                        ON "REQUISITION7"."jobinformationno" = "JOBINFORMATION3"."JOBINFORMATIONNO"
                            INNER JOIN "RSJOBTYPEDESCRIPTION__Requisition_9"
                            ON "RSJOBTYPEDESCRIPTION__Requisition_9"."RSJOBTYPENO" = "JOBINFORMATION3"."JOBTYPENO"
                                LEFT OUTER JOIN "taleo"."ps_candofr_jdo" "PS_CANDOFR_JDO_Requisition_"
                                ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."OFFERNO" = "PS_CANDOFR_JDO_Requisition_"."offerno"
                                    LEFT OUTER JOIN "taleo"."olforganizationdescopti" "OLFORGANIZATIONDESCOPTI__REQUISITION_"
                                    ON "REQUISITION7"."olforganizationno" = "OLFORGANIZATIONDESCOPTI__REQUISITION_"."olforganizationno"
                                        LEFT OUTER JOIN "JOBINFORMATIONDESCRIPTION12"
                                        ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."JOBINFORMATIONNO" = "JOBINFORMATIONDESCRIPTION12"."JOBINFORMATIONNO"
                                            LEFT OUTER JOIN 
                                            "OLFLOCATION__PRIMARY_"
                                                INNER JOIN "taleo"."olflocationdescopti" "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"
                                                ON "OLFLOCATION__PRIMARY_"."OLFLOCATIONNO" = "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."olflocationno"
                                            ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."PRIMARYLOCATIONNO" = "OLFLOCATION__PRIMARY_"."OLFLOCATIONNO"
                                                LEFT OUTER JOIN 
                                                "taleo"."willtravel" "WILLTRAVEL14"
                                                    INNER JOIN "RPRESOURCEVALUE16"
                                                    ON "WILLTRAVEL14"."rpresourceno" = "RPRESOURCEVALUE16"."RPRESOURCENO"
                                                ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."WILLTRAVELNO" = "WILLTRAVEL14"."willtravelno"
                                                    LEFT OUTER JOIN "ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"
                                                    ON "REQUISITION7"."hiringmanagerassistantno" = "ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."ARUSERNO"
                                                        LEFT OUTER JOIN "HIRE_COUNT_"
                                                        ON "REQUISITION7"."requisitionno" = "HIRE_COUNT_"."REQUISITIONNO"
                                                            LEFT OUTER JOIN "JUSTIFICATIONDESCRIPTION21"
                                                            ON "REQUISITION7"."justificationno" = "JUSTIFICATIONDESCRIPTION21"."JUSTIFICATIONNO"
                                                                LEFT OUTER JOIN "taleo"."ps_department_jdo" "ps_department_jdo"
                                                                ON "REQUISITION7"."departmentno" = "ps_department_jdo"."departmentno" 
WHERE 
    "REQUISITION7"."contestnumber" = ? AND
    "JOBINFORMATIONDESCRIPTION12"."LOCALE" = varchar 'en' 
GROUP BY 
    "JOBINFORMATIONDESCRIPTION12"."TITLE", 
    "REQUISITION7"."contestnumber", 
    concat(concat(concat(concat(concat(concat("OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name2", varchar ' > '), "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name3"), varchar ' > '), "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name4"), varchar ' > '), "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name5"), 
    "RPRESOURCE_Requisition_Type_"."name", 
    concat(concat(COALESCE(
        "HIRE_COUNT_"."HIRE_COUNT", 
        0), varchar ' out of '), "JOBINFORMATION3"."NBTOHIRE"), 
    "JOBINFORMATION3"."NBTOHIRE", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_psacquisitioncode", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_positionbudgeted", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_candidatepreselected", 
    CASE 
        WHEN "JUSTIFICATIONDESCRIPTION21"."LANGUAGE" = varchar '2' THEN "JUSTIFICATIONDESCRIPTION21"."JUSTIFICATIONDESC"
    END, 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_role_type", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_products", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_leadershipdevprogreq", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_leadershipdevstatus", 
    "OLFORGANIZATIONDESCOPTI__REQUISITION_"."name2", 
    "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name2", 
    "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name3",

    (("PS_CANDOFR_JDO_Requisition_"."cgps_jobcode" || varchar ' - ') || "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cgps_jobtitle") AS "Requisition_Template", 
    CASE 
        WHEN "ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."LASTNAME" IS NULL THEN NULL
        ELSE TRIM(BOTH FROM ((((NVL("ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."LASTNAME", varchar ' ') || varchar ', ') || NVL("ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."FIRSTNAME", varchar ' ')) || varchar ' ') || NVL("ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."MIDDLEINITIAL", varchar ' ')))
    END AS "HIRING_MGR_ASSISTANT_NAME",

        ELSE varchar 'Yes'
    END AS "Auto_Reject_Filled",

        ELSE varchar 'Yes'
    END AS "Auto_Reject_Cancelled", 
    CASE 
        WHEN "JOBINFORMATION3"."AUTODECLINECANDIDATES" = 0 THEN varchar 'No'
        ELSE varchar 'Yes'
    END AS "Auto_Decline_Candidates", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_referralplan" AS "CG_REFERRALPLAN", 
    "RSJOBTYPEDESCRIPTION__Requisition_9"."RSJOBTYPEDESC" AS "RSJOBTYPEDESC", 
    "RSJOBLEVELDESCRIPTION_Requisition_4"."RSJOBLEVELDESC" AS "RSJOBLEVELDESC",

    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_homebased_internal" AS "CG_HOMEBASED_INTERNAL", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cgps_rolesummary" AS "CGPS_ROLESUMMARY", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_eeo" AS "CG_EEO"
FROM
    "HIRETYPE0"
        INNER JOIN "taleo"."rpresource" "RPRESOURCE_Requisition_Type_"
        ON "HIRETYPE0"."RPRESOURCENO" = "RPRESOURCE_Requisition_Type_"."rpresourceno"
            INNER JOIN "JOBINFORMATION3"
            ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."HIRETYPENO" = "HIRETYPE0"."HIRETYPENO"
                INNER JOIN "taleo"."ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo" "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"
                ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."JOBINFORMATIONNO" = "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."jobinformationno"
                    INNER JOIN "RSJOBLEVELDESCRIPTION_Requisition_4"
                    ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."JOBLEVELNO" = "RSJOBLEVELDESCRIPTION_Requisition_4"."RSJOBLEVELNO"
                        INNER JOIN "taleo"."requisition" "REQUISITION7"
                        ON "REQUISITION7"."jobinformationno" = "JOBINFORMATION3"."JOBINFORMATIONNO"
                            INNER JOIN "RSJOBTYPEDESCRIPTION__Requisition_9"
                            ON "RSJOBTYPEDESCRIPTION__Requisition_9"."RSJOBTYPENO" = "JOBINFORMATION3"."JOBTYPENO"
                                LEFT OUTER JOIN "taleo"."ps_candofr_jdo" "PS_CANDOFR_JDO_Requisition_"
                                ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."OFFERNO" = "PS_CANDOFR_JDO_Requisition_"."offerno"
                                    LEFT OUTER JOIN "taleo"."olforganizationdescopti" "OLFORGANIZATIONDESCOPTI__REQUISITION_"
                                    ON "REQUISITION7"."olforganizationno" = "OLFORGANIZATIONDESCOPTI__REQUISITION_"."olforganizationno"
                                        LEFT OUTER JOIN "JOBINFORMATIONDESCRIPTION12"
                                        ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."JOBINFORMATIONNO" = "JOBINFORMATIONDESCRIPTION12"."JOBINFORMATIONNO"
                                            LEFT OUTER JOIN 
                                            "OLFLOCATION__PRIMARY_"
                                                INNER JOIN "taleo"."olflocationdescopti" "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"
                                                ON "OLFLOCATION__PRIMARY_"."OLFLOCATIONNO" = "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."olflocationno"
                                            ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."PRIMARYLOCATIONNO" = "OLFLOCATION__PRIMARY_"."OLFLOCATIONNO"
                                                LEFT OUTER JOIN 
                                                "taleo"."willtravel" "WILLTRAVEL14"
                                                    INNER JOIN "RPRESOURCEVALUE16"
                                                    ON "WILLTRAVEL14"."rpresourceno" = "RPRESOURCEVALUE16"."RPRESOURCENO"
                                                ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."WILLTRAVELNO" = "WILLTRAVEL14"."willtravelno"
                                                    LEFT OUTER JOIN "ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"
                                                    ON "REQUISITION7"."hiringmanagerassistantno" = "ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."ARUSERNO"
                                                        LEFT OUTER JOIN "HIRE_COUNT_"
                                                        ON "REQUISITION7"."requisitionno" = "HIRE_COUNT_"."REQUISITIONNO"
                                                            LEFT OUTER JOIN "JUSTIFICATIONDESCRIPTION21"
                                                            ON "REQUISITION7"."justificationno" = "JUSTIFICATIONDESCRIPTION21"."JUSTIFICATIONNO"
                                                                LEFT OUTER JOIN "taleo"."ps_department_jdo" "ps_department_jdo"
                                                                ON "REQUISITION7"."departmentno" = "ps_department_jdo"."departmentno" 
WHERE 
    "REQUISITION7"."contestnumber" = ? AND
    "JOBINFORMATIONDESCRIPTION12"."LOCALE" = varchar 'en' 
GROUP BY

    "REQUISITION7"."contestnumber", 
    concat(concat(concat(concat(concat(concat("OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name2", varchar ' > '), "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name3"), varchar ' > '), "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name4"), varchar ' > '), "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name5"),

    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_leadershipdevprogreq", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_leadershipdevstatus",

    "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name3", 
    "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name4", 
    "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name5",

    (("PS_CANDOFR_JDO_Requisition_"."cgps_jobcode" || varchar ' - ') || "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cgps_jobtitle"), 
    CASE 
        WHEN "ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."LASTNAME" IS NULL THEN NULL
        ELSE TRIM(BOTH FROM ((((NVL("ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."LASTNAME", varchar ' ') || varchar ', ') || NVL("ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."FIRSTNAME", varchar ' ')) || varchar ' ') || NVL("ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."MIDDLEINITIAL", varchar ' ')))
    END, 
    CASE 
        WHEN "JOBINFORMATION3"."ISAUTOREJECTFILLED" = 0 THEN varchar 'No'
        ELSE varchar 'Yes'
    END, 
    CASE 
        WHEN "JOBINFORMATION3"."ISAUTOREJECTCANCELLED" = 0 THEN varchar 'No'
        ELSE varchar 'Yes'
    END, 
    CASE 
        WHEN "JOBINFORMATION3"."AUTODECLINECANDIDATES" = 0 THEN varchar 'No'
        ELSE varchar 'Yes'
    END,

    "RSJOBTYPEDESCRIPTION__Requisition_9"."RSJOBTYPEDESC", 
    "RSJOBLEVELDESCRIPTION_Requisition_4"."RSJOBLEVELDESC", 
    "RPRESOURCEVALUE16"."VALUE", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_homebased", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_homebased_internal",

    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_eeo"

                    INNER JOIN "RSJOBLEVELDESCRIPTION_Requisition_4"

                        INNER JOIN "taleo"."requisition" "REQUISITION7"

                            INNER JOIN "RSJOBTYPEDESCRIPTION__Requisition_9"

        ELSE TRIM(BOTH FROM ((((NVL("ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."LASTNAME", varchar ' ') || varchar ', ') || NVL("ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."FIRSTNAME", varchar ' ')) || varchar ' ') || NVL("ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."MIDDLEINITIAL", varchar ' ')))

                        INNER JOIN "taleo"."requisition" "REQUISITION7"

                            INNER JOIN "RSJOBTYPEDESCRIPTION__Requisition_9"

    CASE 
        WHEN "ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."LASTNAME" IS NULL THEN NULL
        ELSE TRIM(BOTH FROM ((((NVL("ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."LASTNAME", varchar ' ') || varchar ', ') || NVL("ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."FIRSTNAME", varchar ' ')) || varchar ' ') || NVL("ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."MIDDLEINITIAL", varchar ' ')))

    "RSJOBTYPEDESCRIPTION__Requisition_9"."RSJOBTYPEDESC",

    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_homebased", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_homebased_internal",

    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_eeo"

WITH

SELECT
    "JOBINFORMATIONDESCRIPTION12"."TITLE" AS "TITLE", 
    "REQUISITION7"."contestnumber" AS "REQUISITION_ID", 
    concat(concat(concat(concat(concat(concat("OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name2", varchar ' > '), "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name3"), varchar ' > '), "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name4"), varchar ' > '), "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name5") AS "Primary_Location", 
    "RPRESOURCE_Requisition_Type_"."name" AS "Requisition_Type",

        "HIRE_COUNT_"."HIRE_COUNT", 
        0), varchar ' out of '), "JOBINFORMATION3"."NBTOHIRE") AS "Hired_Candidates", 
    "JOBINFORMATION3"."NBTOHIRE" AS "Number_of_Openings", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_psacquisitioncode" AS "CG_PSACQUISITIONCODE",

    END AS "Justification__Requisition_",

    (("PS_CANDOFR_JDO_Requisition_"."cgps_jobcode" || varchar ' - ') || "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cgps_jobtitle") AS "Requisition_Template", 
    CASE 
        WHEN "ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."LASTNAME" IS NULL THEN NULL
        ELSE TRIM(BOTH FROM ((((NVL("ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."LASTNAME", varchar ' ') || varchar ', ') || NVL("ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."FIRSTNAME", varchar ' ')) || varchar ' ') || NVL("ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."MIDDLEINITIAL", varchar ' ')))
    END AS "HIRING_MGR_ASSISTANT_NAME",

        ELSE varchar 'Yes'
    END AS "Auto_Reject_Cancelled",

        WHEN "JOBINFORMATION3"."AUTODECLINECANDIDATES" = 0 THEN varchar 'No'
        ELSE varchar 'Yes'
    END AS "Auto_Decline_Candidates", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_referralplan" AS "CG_REFERRALPLAN", 
    "RSJOBTYPEDESCRIPTION__Requisition_9"."RSJOBTYPEDESC" AS "RSJOBTYPEDESC", 
    "RSJOBLEVELDESCRIPTION_Requisition_4"."RSJOBLEVELDESC" AS "RSJOBLEVELDESC",

    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_homebased_internal" AS "CG_HOMEBASED_INTERNAL", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cgps_rolesummary" AS "CGPS_ROLESUMMARY", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_eeo" AS "CG_EEO"
FROM
    "HIRETYPE0"
        INNER JOIN "taleo"."rpresource" "RPRESOURCE_Requisition_Type_"
        ON "HIRETYPE0"."RPRESOURCENO" = "RPRESOURCE_Requisition_Type_"."rpresourceno"
            INNER JOIN "JOBINFORMATION3"
            ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."HIRETYPENO" = "HIRETYPE0"."HIRETYPENO"
                INNER JOIN "taleo"."ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo" "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"
                ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."JOBINFORMATIONNO" = "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."jobinformationno"
                    INNER JOIN "RSJOBLEVELDESCRIPTION_Requisition_4"
                    ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."JOBLEVELNO" = "RSJOBLEVELDESCRIPTION_Requisition_4"."RSJOBLEVELNO"
                        INNER JOIN "taleo"."requisition" "REQUISITION7"
                        ON "REQUISITION7"."jobinformationno" = "JOBINFORMATION3"."JOBINFORMATIONNO"
                            INNER JOIN "RSJOBTYPEDESCRIPTION__Requisition_9"
                            ON "RSJOBTYPEDESCRIPTION__Requisition_9"."RSJOBTYPENO" = "JOBINFORMATION3"."JOBTYPENO"
                                LEFT OUTER JOIN "taleo"."ps_candofr_jdo" "PS_CANDOFR_JDO_Requisition_"
                                ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."OFFERNO" = "PS_CANDOFR_JDO_Requisition_"."offerno"
                                    LEFT OUTER JOIN "taleo"."olforganizationdescopti" "OLFORGANIZATIONDESCOPTI__REQUISITION_"
                                    ON "REQUISITION7"."olforganizationno" = "OLFORGANIZATIONDESCOPTI__REQUISITION_"."olforganizationno"
                                        LEFT OUTER JOIN "JOBINFORMATIONDESCRIPTION12"
                                        ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."JOBINFORMATIONNO" = "JOBINFORMATIONDESCRIPTION12"."JOBINFORMATIONNO"
                                            LEFT OUTER JOIN 
                                            "OLFLOCATION__PRIMARY_"
                                                INNER JOIN "taleo"."olflocationdescopti" "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"
                                                ON "OLFLOCATION__PRIMARY_"."OLFLOCATIONNO" = "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."olflocationno"
                                            ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."PRIMARYLOCATIONNO" = "OLFLOCATION__PRIMARY_"."OLFLOCATIONNO"
                                                LEFT OUTER JOIN

                                                    INNER JOIN "RPRESOURCEVALUE16"
                                                    ON "WILLTRAVEL14"."rpresourceno" = "RPRESOURCEVALUE16"."RPRESOURCENO"
                                                ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."WILLTRAVELNO" = "WILLTRAVEL14"."willtravelno"
                                                    LEFT OUTER JOIN "ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"
                                                    ON "REQUISITION7"."hiringmanagerassistantno" = "ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."ARUSERNO"
                                                        LEFT OUTER JOIN "HIRE_COUNT_"
                                                        ON "REQUISITION7"."requisitionno" = "HIRE_COUNT_"."REQUISITIONNO"
                                                            LEFT OUTER JOIN "JUSTIFICATIONDESCRIPTION21"
                                                            ON "REQUISITION7"."justificationno" = "JUSTIFICATIONDESCRIPTION21"."JUSTIFICATIONNO"
                                                                LEFT OUTER JOIN "taleo"."ps_department_jdo" "ps_department_jdo"
                                                                ON "REQUISITION7"."departmentno" = "ps_department_jdo"."departmentno" 
WHERE 
    "REQUISITION7"."contestnumber" = ? AND
    "JOBINFORMATIONDESCRIPTION12"."LOCALE" = varchar 'en' 
GROUP BY

    "REQUISITION7"."contestnumber", 
    concat(concat(concat(concat(concat(concat("OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name2", varchar ' > '), "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name3"), varchar ' > '), "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name4"), varchar ' > '), "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name5"), 
    "RPRESOURCE_Requisition_Type_"."name",

        "HIRE_COUNT_"."HIRE_COUNT", 
        0), varchar ' out of '), "JOBINFORMATION3"."NBTOHIRE"),

    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_psacquisitioncode",

    END, 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_role_type", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_products", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_leadershipdevprogreq", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_leadershipdevstatus", 
    "OLFORGANIZATIONDESCOPTI__REQUISITION_"."name2", 
    "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name2", 
    "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name3", 
    "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name4", 
    "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name5", 
    (("ps_department_jdo"."departmentnumber" || varchar ' - ') || "ps_department_jdo"."departmentname"), 
    (("PS_CANDOFR_JDO_Requisition_"."cgps_jobcode" || varchar ' - ') || "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cgps_jobtitle"), 
    CASE 
        WHEN "ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."LASTNAME" IS NULL THEN NULL
        ELSE TRIM(BOTH FROM ((((NVL("ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."LASTNAME", varchar ' ') || varchar ', ') || NVL("ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."FIRSTNAME", varchar ' ')) || varchar ' ') || NVL("ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."MIDDLEINITIAL", varchar ' ')))

SELECT

        "HIRE_COUNT_"."HIRE_COUNT",

    END AS "Justification__Requisition_",

    (("PS_CANDOFR_JDO_Requisition_"."cgps_jobcode" || varchar ' - ') || "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cgps_jobtitle") AS "Requisition_Template", 
    CASE 
        WHEN "ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."LASTNAME" IS NULL THEN NULL
        ELSE TRIM(BOTH FROM ((((NVL("ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."LASTNAME", varchar ' ') || varchar ', ') || NVL("ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."FIRSTNAME", varchar ' ')) || varchar ' ') || NVL("ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."MIDDLEINITIAL", varchar ' ')))
    END AS "HIRING_MGR_ASSISTANT_NAME",

        ELSE varchar 'Yes'
    END AS "Auto_Reject_Filled",

        ELSE varchar 'Yes'
    END AS "Auto_Reject_Cancelled", 
    CASE 
        WHEN "JOBINFORMATION3"."AUTODECLINECANDIDATES" = 0 THEN varchar 'No'
        ELSE varchar 'Yes'
    END AS "Auto_Decline_Candidates", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_referralplan" AS "CG_REFERRALPLAN", 
    "RSJOBTYPEDESCRIPTION__Requisition_9"."RSJOBTYPEDESC" AS "RSJOBTYPEDESC", 
    "RSJOBLEVELDESCRIPTION_Requisition_4"."RSJOBLEVELDESC" AS "RSJOBLEVELDESC",

    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_homebased_internal" AS "CG_HOMEBASED_INTERNAL", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cgps_rolesummary" AS "CGPS_ROLESUMMARY", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_eeo" AS "CG_EEO"
FROM
    "HIRETYPE0"
        INNER JOIN "taleo"."rpresource" "RPRESOURCE_Requisition_Type_"
        ON "HIRETYPE0"."RPRESOURCENO" = "RPRESOURCE_Requisition_Type_"."rpresourceno"
            INNER JOIN "JOBINFORMATION3"
            ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."HIRETYPENO" = "HIRETYPE0"."HIRETYPENO"
                INNER JOIN "taleo"."ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo" "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"
                ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."JOBINFORMATIONNO" = "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."jobinformationno"
                    INNER JOIN "RSJOBLEVELDESCRIPTION_Requisition_4"
                    ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."JOBLEVELNO" = "RSJOBLEVELDESCRIPTION_Requisition_4"."RSJOBLEVELNO"
                        INNER JOIN "taleo"."requisition" "REQUISITION7"
                        ON "REQUISITION7"."jobinformationno" = "JOBINFORMATION3"."JOBINFORMATIONNO"
                            INNER JOIN "RSJOBTYPEDESCRIPTION__Requisition_9"
                            ON "RSJOBTYPEDESCRIPTION__Requisition_9"."RSJOBTYPENO" = "JOBINFORMATION3"."JOBTYPENO"
                                LEFT OUTER JOIN "taleo"."ps_candofr_jdo" "PS_CANDOFR_JDO_Requisition_"
                                ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."OFFERNO" = "PS_CANDOFR_JDO_Requisition_"."offerno"
                                    LEFT OUTER JOIN "taleo"."olforganizationdescopti" "OLFORGANIZATIONDESCOPTI__REQUISITION_"
                                    ON "REQUISITION7"."olforganizationno" = "OLFORGANIZATIONDESCOPTI__REQUISITION_"."olforganizationno"
                                        LEFT OUTER JOIN "JOBINFORMATIONDESCRIPTION12"
                                        ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."JOBINFORMATIONNO" = "JOBINFORMATIONDESCRIPTION12"."JOBINFORMATIONNO"
                                            LEFT OUTER JOIN 
                                            "OLFLOCATION__PRIMARY_"
                                                INNER JOIN "taleo"."olflocationdescopti" "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"
                                                ON "OLFLOCATION__PRIMARY_"."OLFLOCATIONNO" = "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."olflocationno"
                                            ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."PRIMARYLOCATIONNO" = "OLFLOCATION__PRIMARY_"."OLFLOCATIONNO"
                                                LEFT OUTER JOIN 
                                                "taleo"."willtravel" "WILLTRAVEL14"
                                                    INNER JOIN "RPRESOURCEVALUE16"
                                                    ON "WILLTRAVEL14"."rpresourceno" = "RPRESOURCEVALUE16"."RPRESOURCENO"
                                                ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."WILLTRAVELNO" = "WILLTRAVEL14"."willtravelno"
                                                    LEFT OUTER JOIN "ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"
                                                    ON "REQUISITION7"."hiringmanagerassistantno" = "ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."ARUSERNO"
                                                        LEFT OUTER JOIN "HIRE_COUNT_"
                                                        ON "REQUISITION7"."requisitionno" = "HIRE_COUNT_"."REQUISITIONNO"
                                                            LEFT OUTER JOIN "JUSTIFICATIONDESCRIPTION21"
                                                            ON "REQUISITION7"."justificationno" = "JUSTIFICATIONDESCRIPTION21"."JUSTIFICATIONNO"
                                                                LEFT OUTER JOIN "taleo"."ps_department_jdo" "ps_department_jdo"
                                                                ON "REQUISITION7"."departmentno" = "ps_department_jdo"."departmentno" 
WHERE 
    "REQUISITION7"."contestnumber" = ? AND
    "JOBINFORMATIONDESCRIPTION12"."LOCALE" = varchar 'en' 
GROUP BY

    "REQUISITION7"."contestnumber", 
    concat(concat(concat(concat(concat(concat("OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name2", varchar ' > '), "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name3"), varchar ' > '), "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name4"), varchar ' > '), "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name5"),

    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_leadershipdevprogreq", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_leadershipdevstatus", 
    "OLFORGANIZATIONDESCOPTI__REQUISITION_"."name2",

    "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name3", 
    "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name4", 
    "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name5",

    (("PS_CANDOFR_JDO_Requisition_"."cgps_jobcode" || varchar ' - ') || "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cgps_jobtitle"), 
    CASE 
        WHEN "ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."LASTNAME" IS NULL THEN NULL
        ELSE TRIM(BOTH FROM ((((NVL("ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."LASTNAME", varchar ' ') || varchar ', ') || NVL("ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."FIRSTNAME", varchar ' ')) || varchar ' ') || NVL("ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."MIDDLEINITIAL", varchar ' ')))
    END, 
    CASE 
        WHEN "JOBINFORMATION3"."ISAUTOREJECTFILLED" = 0 THEN varchar 'No'
        ELSE varchar 'Yes'
    END, 
    CASE 
        WHEN "JOBINFORMATION3"."ISAUTOREJECTCANCELLED" = 0 THEN varchar 'No'
        ELSE varchar 'Yes'
    END, 
    CASE 
        WHEN "JOBINFORMATION3"."AUTODECLINECANDIDATES" = 0 THEN varchar 'No'
        ELSE varchar 'Yes'
    END,

    "RSJOBTYPEDESCRIPTION__Requisition_9"."RSJOBTYPEDESC", 
    "RSJOBLEVELDESCRIPTION_Requisition_4"."RSJOBLEVELDESC",

    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_homebased", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_homebased_internal",

    END AS "Auto_Reject_Filled", 
    CASE 
        WHEN "JOBINFORMATION3"."ISAUTOREJECTCANCELLED" = 0 THEN varchar 'No'
        ELSE varchar 'Yes'
    END AS "Auto_Reject_Cancelled", 
    CASE 
        WHEN "JOBINFORMATION3"."AUTODECLINECANDIDATES" = 0 THEN varchar 'No'
        ELSE varchar 'Yes'
    END AS "Auto_Decline_Candidates", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_referralplan" AS "CG_REFERRALPLAN", 
    "RSJOBTYPEDESCRIPTION__Requisition_9"."RSJOBTYPEDESC" AS "RSJOBTYPEDESC", 
    "RSJOBLEVELDESCRIPTION_Requisition_4"."RSJOBLEVELDESC" AS "RSJOBLEVELDESC", 
    "RPRESOURCEVALUE16"."VALUE" AS "Travel", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_homebased" AS "CG_HOMEBASED", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_homebased_internal" AS "CG_HOMEBASED_INTERNAL", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cgps_rolesummary" AS "CGPS_ROLESUMMARY", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_eeo" AS "CG_EEO"
FROM
    "HIRETYPE0"
        INNER JOIN "taleo"."rpresource" "RPRESOURCE_Requisition_Type_"
        ON "HIRETYPE0"."RPRESOURCENO" = "RPRESOURCE_Requisition_Type_"."rpresourceno"
            INNER JOIN "JOBINFORMATION3"
            ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."HIRETYPENO" = "HIRETYPE0"."HIRETYPENO"
                INNER JOIN "taleo"."ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo" "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"
                ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."JOBINFORMATIONNO" = "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."jobinformationno"
                    INNER JOIN "RSJOBLEVELDESCRIPTION_Requisition_4"
                    ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."JOBLEVELNO" = "RSJOBLEVELDESCRIPTION_Requisition_4"."RSJOBLEVELNO"
                        INNER JOIN "taleo"."requisition" "REQUISITION7"
                        ON "REQUISITION7"."jobinformationno" = "JOBINFORMATION3"."JOBINFORMATIONNO"
                            INNER JOIN "RSJOBTYPEDESCRIPTION__Requisition_9"
                            ON "RSJOBTYPEDESCRIPTION__Requisition_9"."RSJOBTYPENO" = "JOBINFORMATION3"."JOBTYPENO"
                                LEFT OUTER JOIN "taleo"."ps_candofr_jdo" "PS_CANDOFR_JDO_Requisition_"
                                ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."OFFERNO" = "PS_CANDOFR_JDO_Requisition_"."offerno"
                                    LEFT OUTER JOIN "taleo"."olforganizationdescopti" "OLFORGANIZATIONDESCOPTI__REQUISITION_"
                                    ON "REQUISITION7"."olforganizationno" = "OLFORGANIZATIONDESCOPTI__REQUISITION_"."olforganizationno"
                                        LEFT OUTER JOIN "JOBINFORMATIONDESCRIPTION12"
                                        ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."JOBINFORMATIONNO" = "JOBINFORMATIONDESCRIPTION12"."JOBINFORMATIONNO"
                                            LEFT OUTER JOIN 
                                            "OLFLOCATION__PRIMARY_"
                                                INNER JOIN "taleo"."olflocationdescopti" "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"
                                                ON "OLFLOCATION__PRIMARY_"."OLFLOCATIONNO" = "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."olflocationno"
                                            ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."PRIMARYLOCATIONNO" = "OLFLOCATION__PRIMARY_"."OLFLOCATIONNO"
                                                LEFT OUTER JOIN 
                                                "taleo"."willtravel" "WILLTRAVEL14"
                                                    INNER JOIN "RPRESOURCEVALUE16"
                                                    ON "WILLTRAVEL14"."rpresourceno" = "RPRESOURCEVALUE16"."RPRESOURCENO"
                                                ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."WILLTRAVELNO" = "WILLTRAVEL14"."willtravelno"
                                                    LEFT OUTER JOIN "ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"
                                                    ON "REQUISITION7"."hiringmanagerassistantno" = "ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."ARUSERNO"
                                                        LEFT OUTER JOIN "HIRE_COUNT_"
                                                        ON "REQUISITION7"."requisitionno" = "HIRE_COUNT_"."REQUISITIONNO"
                                                            LEFT OUTER JOIN "JUSTIFICATIONDESCRIPTION21"
                                                            ON "REQUISITION7"."justificationno" = "JUSTIFICATIONDESCRIPTION21"."JUSTIFICATIONNO"
                                                                LEFT OUTER JOIN "taleo"."ps_department_jdo" "ps_department_jdo"
                                                                ON "REQUISITION7"."departmentno" = "ps_department_jdo"."departmentno" 
WHERE 
    "REQUISITION7"."contestnumber" = ? AND
    "JOBINFORMATIONDESCRIPTION12"."LOCALE" = varchar 'en' 
GROUP BY 
    "JOBINFORMATIONDESCRIPTION12"."TITLE", 
    "REQUISITION7"."contestnumber", 
    concat(concat(concat(concat(concat(concat("OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name2", varchar ' > '), "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name3"), varchar ' > '), "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name4"), varchar ' > '), "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name5"), 
    "RPRESOURCE_Requisition_Type_"."name", 
    concat(concat(COALESCE(
        "HIRE_COUNT_"."HIRE_COUNT", 
        0), varchar ' out of '), "JOBINFORMATION3"."NBTOHIRE"), 
    "JOBINFORMATION3"."NBTOHIRE", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_psacquisitioncode",

    END,

    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_products", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_leadershipdevprogreq", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_leadershipdevstatus", 
    "OLFORGANIZATIONDESCOPTI__REQUISITION_"."name2", 
    "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name2", 
    "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name3", 
    "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name4", 
    "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name5", 
    (("ps_department_jdo"."departmentnumber" || varchar ' - ') || "ps_department_jdo"."departmentname"), 
    (("PS_CANDOFR_JDO_Requisition_"."cgps_jobcode" || varchar ' - ') || "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cgps_jobtitle"), 
    CASE 
        WHEN "ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."LASTNAME" IS NULL THEN NULL
        ELSE TRIM(BOTH FROM ((((NVL("ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."LASTNAME", varchar ' ') || varchar ', ') || NVL("ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."FIRSTNAME", varchar ' ')) || varchar ' ') || NVL("ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."MIDDLEINITIAL", varchar ' ')))
    END, 
    CASE 
        WHEN "JOBINFORMATION3"."ISAUTOREJECTFILLED" = 0 THEN varchar 'No'
        ELSE varchar 'Yes'
    END, 
    CASE 
        WHEN "JOBINFORMATION3"."ISAUTOREJECTCANCELLED" = 0 THEN varchar 'No'
        ELSE varchar 'Yes'
    END, 
    CASE 
        WHEN "JOBINFORMATION3"."AUTODECLINECANDIDATES" = 0 THEN varchar 'No'
        ELSE varchar 'Yes'
    END, 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_referralplan", 
    "RSJOBTYPEDESCRIPTION__Requisition_9"."RSJOBTYPEDESC", 
    "RSJOBLEVELDESCRIPTION_Requisition_4"."RSJOBLEVELDESC", 
    "RPRESOURCEVALUE16"."VALUE", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_homebased", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_homebased_internal",

    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_eeo"

WITH

"HIRE_COUNT_" AS

"JUSTIFICATIONDESCRIPTION21" AS

SELECT
    "JOBINFORMATIONDESCRIPTION12"."TITLE" AS "TITLE", 
    "REQUISITION7"."contestnumber" AS "REQUISITION_ID", 
    concat(concat(concat(concat(concat(concat("OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name2", varchar ' > '), "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name3"), varchar ' > '), "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name4"), varchar ' > '), "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name5") AS "Primary_Location", 
    "RPRESOURCE_Requisition_Type_"."name" AS "Requisition_Type", 
    concat(concat(COALESCE(
        "HIRE_COUNT_"."HIRE_COUNT", 
        0), varchar ' out of '), "JOBINFORMATION3"."NBTOHIRE") AS "Hired_Candidates", 
    "JOBINFORMATION3"."NBTOHIRE" AS "Number_of_Openings", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_psacquisitioncode" AS "CG_PSACQUISITIONCODE", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_positionbudgeted" AS "CG_POSITIONBUDGETED", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_candidatepreselected" AS "CG_CANDIDATEPRESELECTED", 
    CASE 
        WHEN "JUSTIFICATIONDESCRIPTION21"."LANGUAGE" = varchar '2' THEN "JUSTIFICATIONDESCRIPTION21"."JUSTIFICATIONDESC"
    END AS "Justification__Requisition_", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_role_type" AS "CG_ROLE_TYPE", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_products" AS "CG_PRODUCTS",

    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_leadershipdevstatus" AS "CG_LEADERSHIPDEVSTATUS",

    "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name3" AS "Primary_State", 
    "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name4" AS "Primary_City", 
    "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."name5" AS "Primary_Office_Location", 
    (("ps_department_jdo"."departmentnumber" || varchar ' - ') || "ps_department_jdo"."departmentname") AS "DEPARTMENTNAME1", 
    (("PS_CANDOFR_JDO_Requisition_"."cgps_jobcode" || varchar ' - ') || "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cgps_jobtitle") AS "Requisition_Template", 
    CASE 
        WHEN "ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."LASTNAME" IS NULL THEN NULL
        ELSE TRIM(BOTH FROM ((((NVL("ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."LASTNAME", varchar ' ') || varchar ', ') || NVL("ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."FIRSTNAME", varchar ' ')) || varchar ' ') || NVL("ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"."MIDDLEINITIAL", varchar ' ')))
    END AS "HIRING_MGR_ASSISTANT_NAME", 
    CASE 
        WHEN "JOBINFORMATION3"."ISAUTOREJECTFILLED" = 0 THEN varchar 'No'
        ELSE varchar 'Yes'
    END AS "Auto_Reject_Filled", 
    CASE 
        WHEN "JOBINFORMATION3"."ISAUTOREJECTCANCELLED" = 0 THEN varchar 'No'
        ELSE varchar 'Yes'
    END AS "Auto_Reject_Cancelled", 
    CASE 
        WHEN "JOBINFORMATION3"."AUTODECLINECANDIDATES" = 0 THEN varchar 'No'
        ELSE varchar 'Yes'
    END AS "Auto_Decline_Candidates", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_referralplan" AS "CG_REFERRALPLAN", 
    "RSJOBTYPEDESCRIPTION__Requisition_9"."RSJOBTYPEDESC" AS "RSJOBTYPEDESC", 
    "RSJOBLEVELDESCRIPTION_Requisition_4"."RSJOBLEVELDESC" AS "RSJOBLEVELDESC", 
    "RPRESOURCEVALUE16"."VALUE" AS "Travel", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_homebased" AS "CG_HOMEBASED", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_homebased_internal" AS "CG_HOMEBASED_INTERNAL", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cgps_rolesummary" AS "CGPS_ROLESUMMARY", 
    "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_eeo" AS "CG_EEO"
FROM
    "HIRETYPE0"
        INNER JOIN "taleo"."rpresource" "RPRESOURCE_Requisition_Type_"
        ON "HIRETYPE0"."RPRESOURCENO" = "RPRESOURCE_Requisition_Type_"."rpresourceno"
            INNER JOIN "JOBINFORMATION3"
            ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."HIRETYPENO" = "HIRETYPE0"."HIRETYPENO"
                INNER JOIN "taleo"."ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo" "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"
                ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."JOBINFORMATIONNO" = "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."jobinformationno"
                    INNER JOIN "RSJOBLEVELDESCRIPTION_Requisition_4"
                    ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."JOBLEVELNO" = "RSJOBLEVELDESCRIPTION_Requisition_4"."RSJOBLEVELNO"
                        INNER JOIN "taleo"."requisition" "REQUISITION7"
                        ON "REQUISITION7"."jobinformationno" = "JOBINFORMATION3"."JOBINFORMATIONNO"
                            INNER JOIN "RSJOBTYPEDESCRIPTION__Requisition_9"
                            ON "RSJOBTYPEDESCRIPTION__Requisition_9"."RSJOBTYPENO" = "JOBINFORMATION3"."JOBTYPENO"
                                LEFT OUTER JOIN "taleo"."ps_candofr_jdo" "PS_CANDOFR_JDO_Requisition_"
                                ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."OFFERNO" = "PS_CANDOFR_JDO_Requisition_"."offerno"
                                    LEFT OUTER JOIN "taleo"."olforganizationdescopti" "OLFORGANIZATIONDESCOPTI__REQUISITION_"
                                    ON "REQUISITION7"."olforganizationno" = "OLFORGANIZATIONDESCOPTI__REQUISITION_"."olforganizationno"
                                        LEFT OUTER JOIN "JOBINFORMATIONDESCRIPTION12"
                                        ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."JOBINFORMATIONNO" = "JOBINFORMATIONDESCRIPTION12"."JOBINFORMATIONNO"
                                            LEFT OUTER JOIN 
                                            "OLFLOCATION__PRIMARY_"
                                                INNER JOIN "taleo"."olflocationdescopti" "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"
                                                ON "OLFLOCATION__PRIMARY_"."OLFLOCATIONNO" = "OLFLOCATIONDESCOPTI__PRIMARY_"."olflocationno"
                                            ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."PRIMARYLOCATIONNO" = "OLFLOCATION__PRIMARY_"."OLFLOCATIONNO"
                                                LEFT OUTER JOIN 
                                                "taleo"."willtravel" "WILLTRAVEL14"
                                                    INNER JOIN "RPRESOURCEVALUE16"
                                                    ON "WILLTRAVEL14"."rpresourceno" = "RPRESOURCEVALUE16"."RPRESOURCENO"
                                                ON "JOBINFORMATION3"."WILLTRAVELNO" = "WILLTRAVEL14"."willtravelno"
                                                    LEFT OUTER JOIN "ARUSER_HirMgrAsstNo_"

WITH 
"jobinformation0" AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM "taleo"."jobinformation"
), 
"argroupdescription1" AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM "taleo"."argroupdescription"
), 
"aruser_recrtowneroperno_" AS (
    SELECT *,
	        "aruser"."aruserno" AS "ARUSERNO"

    FROM "taleo"."aruser"
), 
"jobinformationdescription11" AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM "taleo"."jobinformationdescription"
), 
"jobinformationudfreport12" AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM "taleo"."jobinformationudfreport"
), 
"aruser_contactemail_" AS (
    SELECT *,
	        "aruser"."aruserno" AS "ARUSERNO"

    FROM "taleo"."aruser"
), 
"aruser_contactname_" AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM "taleo"."aruser"
), 
"aruser_hiringmgrno_" AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM "taleo"."aruser"
), 
"aruser_recrtasstno_" AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM "taleo"."aruser"
), 
"sq0_main_query" AS (
    SELECT
        "requisition8"."contestnumber" AS "requisition_id", 
        MIN("ps_reqstat_jdo"."req_status") AS "min1", 
        MIN(TRIM(BOTH FROM ((((NVL("aruser_recrtowneroperno_"."lastname", varchar ' ') || varchar ', ') || NVL("aruser_recrtowneroperno_"."firstname", varchar ' ')) || varchar ' ') || NVL("aruser_recrtowneroperno_"."middleinitial", varchar ' ')))) AS "min11", 
        MIN("ps_department_jdo"."departmentname") AS "min12", 
        MIN("ps_reqstat_jdo"."req_status_details") AS "min13", 
        MIN(TRIM(BOTH FROM ((((NVL("aruser_hiringmgrno_"."lastname", varchar ' ') || varchar ', ') || NVL("aruser_hiringmgrno_"."firstname", varchar ' ')) || varchar ' ') || NVL("aruser_hiringmgrno_"."middleinitial", varchar ' ')))) AS "min14", 
        MIN("ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cgps_jobtitle") AS "min15", 
        MIN("ps_candofr_jdo_requisition_"."cgps_jobcode") AS "min16", 
        MIN("ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_psbandreq") AS "min17", 
        MIN("ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_postingtype") AS "min18", 
        MIN((("jobinformationudfreport12"."udscode15" || varchar ' - ') || "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_reqexpensectr")) AS "min19", 
        MIN("ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_business_line") AS "min110", 
        MIN((("ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cgps_eeocateg_code" || varchar ' - ') || "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cgps_eeocateg")) AS "min111", 
        MIN((("ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cgps_eeogroup_code" || varchar ' - ') || "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cgps_eeogroup")) AS "min112", 
        MIN(
            CASE 
                WHEN "argroupdescription1"."locale" = varchar 'en' THEN "argroupdescription1"."namedescription"
            END
        ) AS "min113", 
        MIN("olfjobfielddescopti__requisition_"."name1") AS "min114", 
        MIN("olfjobfielddescopti__requisition_"."name2") AS "min115", 
        MIN(
            CASE 
                WHEN "aruser_recrtasstno_"."lastname" IS NULL THEN NULL
                ELSE TRIM(BOTH FROM ((((NVL("aruser_recrtasstno_"."lastname", varchar ' ') || varchar ', ') || NVL("aruser_recrtasstno_"."firstname", varchar ' ')) || varchar ' ') || NVL("aruser_recrtasstno_"."middleinitial", varchar ' ')))
            END
        ) AS "min116", 
        MIN("ps_cswworkflow_jdo"."cswworkflowname") AS "min117", 
        MIN("ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_employeeclass") AS "min118", 
        MIN(
            CASE 
                WHEN "rsemployeestatusdescription2"."language" = 2 THEN "rsemployeestatusdescription2"."rsemployeestatusdesc"
            END
        ) AS "min119", 
        MIN(
            CASE 
                WHEN "rsjobshiftdescription6"."language" = 2 THEN "rsjobshiftdescription6"."rsjobshiftdesc"
            END
        ) AS "min120", 
        MIN(
            CASE 
                WHEN "rsjobscheduledescription4"."language" = 8 THEN "rsjobscheduledescription4"."rsjobscheduledesc"
            END
        ) AS "min121", 
        MIN("ps_candofr_jdo_requisition_"."cg_standardhrs") AS "min122", 
        MIN("ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_fte") AS "min123", 
        MIN("ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."cg_competency_list") AS "min124", 
        MIN("jobinformationdescription11"."externaldescription") AS "min125", 
        MIN("jobinformationdescription11"."externalqualification") AS "min126", 
        MIN(TRIM(BOTH FROM ((((NVL("aruser_contactname_"."lastname", varchar ' ') || varchar ', ') || NVL("aruser_contactname_"."firstname", varchar ' ')) || varchar ' ') || NVL("aruser_contactname_"."middleinitial", varchar ' ')))) AS "min127", 
        MIN("aruser_contactemail_"."correspondenceemail") AS "min128", 
        MIN("jobinformationdescription11"."internaldescription") AS "min129", 
        MIN("jobinformationdescription11"."internalqualification") AS "min130"
    FROM
        "jobinformation0"
        INNER JOIN "argroupdescription1" ON "jobinformation0"."groupno" = "argroupdescription1"."argroupno"
        INNER JOIN "taleo"."ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo" "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"
            ON "jobinformation0"."jobinformationno" = "ps_jobinformationcfv_jdo"."jobinformationno"
        INNER JOIN "taleo"."rsemployeestatusdescription" "rsemployeestatusdescription2"
            ON "jobinformation0"."employeestatusno" = "rsemployeestatusdescription2"."rsemployeestatusno"
        INNER JOIN "taleo"."rsjobscheduledescription" "rsjobscheduledescription4"
            ON "jobinformation0"."jobscheduleno" = "rsjobscheduledescription4"."rsjobscheduleno"
        INNER JOIN "taleo"."rsjobshiftdescription" "rsjobshiftdescription6"
            ON "jobinformation0"."jobshiftno" = "rsjobshiftdescription6"."rsjobshiftno"
        INNER JOIN "taleo"."requisition" "requisition8"
            ON "requisition8"."jobinformationno" = "jobinformation0"."jobinformationno"
        LEFT OUTER JOIN "taleo"."ps_candofr_jdo" "ps_candofr_jdo_requisition_"
            ON "jobinformation0"."offerno" = "ps_candofr_jdo_requisition_"."offerno"
        LEFT OUTER JOIN "taleo"."olfjobfielddescopti" "olfjobfielddescopti__requisition_"
            ON "requisition8"."olfjobfieldno" = "olfjobfielddescopti__requisition_"."olfjobfieldno"
        LEFT OUTER JOIN "aruser_recrtowneroperno_"
            ON "jobinformation0"."recruiterowneroperatorno" = "aruser_recrtowneroperno_"."ARUSERNO"
        LEFT OUTER JOIN "jobinformationdescription11"
            ON "jobinformation0"."jobinformationno" = "jobinformationdescription11"."jobinformationno"
        LEFT OUTER JOIN "jobinformationudfreport12"
            ON "jobinformation0"."jobinformationno" = "jobinformationudfreport12"."jobinformationno"
        LEFT OUTER JOIN "taleo"."ps_cswworkflow_jdo" "ps_cswworkflow_jdo"
            ON "jobinformation0"."cswworkflowno" = "ps_cswworkflow_jdo"."cswworkflowno"
        LEFT OUTER JOIN "aruser_contactemail_"
            ON "requisition8"."contactemailintno" = "aruser_contactemail_".ARUSERNO
        LEFT OUTER JOIN "aruser_contactname_"
            ON "requisition8"."contactnameintno" = "aruser_contactname_"."aruserno"
        LEFT OUTER JOIN "aruser_hiringmgrno_"
            ON "requisition8"."hiringmanagerno" = "aruser_hiringmgrno_"."aruserno"
        LEFT OUTER JOIN "aruser_recrtasstno_"
            ON "requisition8"."recruiterassistantno" = "aruser_recrtasstno_"."aruserno"
        LEFT OUTER JOIN "taleo"."ps_department_jdo" "ps_department_jdo"
            ON "requisition8"."departmentno" = "ps_department_jdo"."departmentno"
        LEFT OUTER JOIN "taleo"."ps_reqstat_jdo" "ps_reqstat_jdo"
            ON "requisition8"."contestnumber" = "ps_reqstat_jdo"."req_no"
    WHERE 
        "requisition8"."contestnumber" = ?
    GROUP BY 
        "requisition8"."contestnumber"
)
